cc_no_damage_chairman.flavor: The Chairman. End him without a scratch on you. The sealed chamber will be sealed differently after.

cc_status_cleared_holds.name: Walk Clean from the Holds
cc_status_cleared_holds.flavor: Two doorshuts. When you walk out, no status clings to you. The Holds measure who came through clean.

cc_crit_killing_blow_climb.name: The Climber's Critical at the Step
cc_crit_killing_blow_climb.flavor: A stone-golem at the step. End it with a critical killing blow. The Climb's old grandmasters did it this way.

cc_full_stamina_choir.name: Walk the Choir With Full Breath
cc_full_stamina_choir.flavor: An effigy. End it without spending a single point of stamina. The Choir respects climbers who keep their breath whole.

cc_no_abilities_pallid_stag.name: Honest Steel Against the Stag
cc_no_abilities_pallid_stag.flavor: The Pallid Stag. Sword and feet only. The Witherwood's first hunters did it this way.

cc_thrown_lurcher.name: Thrown Against the Lurcher
cc_thrown_lurcher.flavor: A lurcher. Killed with a thrown weapon — no swung metal. The Reach's old hunters did it this way for the lurchers they had no quarrel with.

cc_pet_assist_silt.name: Let the Pet Bring the Silt-Drowners Down II
cc_pet_assist_silt.flavor: Three silt-drowners. Your pet lands the drop-below-half blow on each. The Reach respects the pet's footwork.

cc_low_hp_devoured.name: An Honest Fight at the Last Hour
cc_low_hp_devoured.flavor: The Devoured Captain ended while you are at the last hour of your hp. The old captains did it this way for the captains they had loved once.

cc_dodging_then_killing_gullet.name: Dodge, Then Strike
cc_dodging_then_killing_gullet.flavor: Two cave-trolls. Each killing blow lands on a turn after you dodged. The kingdom's old rangers did it this way.

cc_stun_killing_blow_bandit.name: End the Bandits While Stunned
cc_stun_killing_blow_bandit.flavor: Three bandits. Each killing blow lands while the bandit is stunned. The kingdom's old patrolmen did it this way.

cc_no_healing_red_beard.name: Refuse Healing in the Holds
cc_no_healing_red_beard.flavor: A Red Beard. No healing received — no potion, no companion, nothing. The Holds' old guards did it this way for the bargain.

cc_unarmed_kill_doorshut.name: Unarmed Against the Doorshut
cc_unarmed_kill_doorshut.flavor: A doorshut. End it with no weapon equipped. The Holds' old fighters did it this way for the doorshuts they had loved once.

cc_named_at_death_giant_bat.name: Name the Bats at Death
cc_named_at_death_giant_bat.flavor: Four giant bats. Speak each one's true name as the killing blow lands. The wood's old hunters knew the names.

hidden_z2_forest.name: After Your Second Step in the Witherwood
hidden_z2_forest.flavor: The wood marks the second visit differently than the first. Two wolves know.

hidden_z2_reach.name: After Your Second Step in the Reach
hidden_z2_reach.flavor: The Reach marks the second visit. Two threshers turn their heads.

hidden_z2_cave.name: After Your Second Step in the Gullet
hidden_z2_cave.flavor: The Gullet's air knows. Two slimes thicken on the wall.

hidden_z2_mourncross.name: After Your Second Step in Mourncross
hidden_z2_mourncross.flavor: Mourncross's stones remember climbers who return. One of the procession turns to greet you.

hidden_z2_choir.name: After Your Second Step in the Choir
hidden_z2_choir.flavor: The Choir's smoke knows climbers who return. One censer-shade thickens at your step.

hidden_z2_mountain.name: After Your Second Step Above the Snowline
hidden_z2_mountain.flavor: Two wraiths know returning climbers. They wait above the snow-line for the second-time step.

hidden_mf_first_grey.name: After Your First Grey Hair
hidden_mf_first_grey.flavor: Once the first grey hair came in, the wood's older wolves knew. One of them is here for you.
hidden_mf_first_grey.reward_chronicle_line: After the first grey hair, an older wolf in the Witherwood waited for them, and they took it kindly.

hidden_mf_wolf_scent.name: After the Wolf Knew Your Scent
hidden_mf_wolf_scent.flavor: Once the wolf knew your scent, two bandits learned it from the wolf. End them. The scent will be only yours again.

hidden_mf_reach_silt.name: After the Silt in Your Boots
hidden_mf_reach_silt.flavor: Once silt sat in your boots, two silt-drowners remembered the weight. End them. The silt will be silt only.

hidden_mf_holds_grief.name: After the Holds Recognized Your Grief
hidden_mf_holds_grief.flavor: Once the Holds recognized your grief, a doorshut wanted to close on it. End the doorshut. The grief stays yours.

hidden_mf_gullet_marked_skin.name: After the Gullet Marked Your Skin
hidden_mf_gullet_marked_skin.flavor: Once the Gullet marked your skin, a troll could read the mark. End the troll. The mark stays your own.

hidden_mf_atrel_held_grief.name: After Atrél Held Your Grief Briefly
hidden_mf_atrel_held_grief.flavor: Once Atrél held your grief briefly, an effigy in the Choir wanted to take it back. End the effigy. The grief is hers, briefly, again.

hidden_mf_penitent_endure.name: After the Penitent Taught Endurance
hidden_mf_penitent_endure.flavor: Once the Penitent taught you endurance, an ogre on the bare ridge tested the teaching. End him.

hidden_mf_summit_listen.name: After the Summit Started to Listen
hidden_mf_summit_listen.flavor: Once the Summit started to listen, the Penitent at the upper stone could no longer ignore you. End him.

hidden_fs_first_save.name: After Your First Save
hidden_fs_first_save.flavor: The first time you save at Gravewatch, a wolf in the wood notices. End it. The kingdom marks the saving.

hidden_fs_first_smith_use.name: After the Smith Took Your Coin
hidden_fs_first_smith_use.flavor: Once you upgraded with the smith, a bandit on the road decided you had something worth taking. End him. He was wrong.

hidden_fs_first_beastmaster.name: After the Beastmaster Took Your Trophy
hidden_fs_first_beastmaster.flavor: Once the Beastmaster took your first trophy, the pack felt the loss. Two of them want their member back. End them.

hidden_fs_companion_hired.name: After Your First Companion
hidden_fs_companion_hired.flavor: Once your first companion stood at your side, two goblins decided to test the count. End them. The companion will know they helped.

purify_witherwood.name: After the Purify, the Wood Is One Count Greener
purify_witherwood.flavor: Once you had purified the kingdom, three wolves in the wood walked one count differently. End them. The wood will be greener for it.

purify_holds.name: After the Purify, the Holds Are Quieter
purify_holds.flavor: Once you had purified the kingdom, five bonesongs in the Holds hummed a quieter pitch. End them. The pitch will be one count under after.

purify_choir.name: After the Purify, the Choir Sings a Younger Air
purify_choir.flavor: Once you had purified the kingdom, two effigies in the Choir sang a younger air. End them. The Choir will sing kinder for one season.
purify_choir.reward_chronicle_line: After the Purify, the Choir's effigies sang a younger air for them — two of those effigies ended kindly.

atrel_reach.name: After Atrél's Peace, the Reach Holds a Grief
atrel_reach.flavor: Once you had made Atrél's Peace, the Reach's Reaper held a grief instead of swinging. End him. The grief is yours, briefly.

atrel_climb.name: After Atrél's Peace, the Climb Is Less Sharp
atrel_climb.flavor: Once you had made Atrél's Peace, three ice-wraiths above the snow-line lost their edge. End them.

atrel_gravewatch_road.name: After Atrél's Peace, a Bandit Knew Better
atrel_gravewatch_road.flavor: Once you had made Atrél's Peace, two bandits on the road decided to test the peace. End them. The peace will hold.
atrel_gravewatch_road.reward_chronicle_line: Bandits had tested Atrél's Peace; two of them ended at the road's edge for the testing.

old_seal_holds.name: After the Old Seal, the Holds Settle
old_seal_holds.flavor: Once you had made The Old Seal, two Red Beards in the Holds knelt without being asked. End them anyway. The Seal will know.

old_seal_gullet.name: After the Old Seal, the Gullet Tightens
old_seal_gullet.flavor: Once you had made The Old Seal, the Maw-Mother tightened her hold. She has been ready for a climber-with-the-Seal-behind-them. End her.
old_seal_gullet.reward_chronicle_line: After the Old Seal, the Maw-Mother braced harder than ever before; they took her in the bracing.

reckoning_mourncross.name: After the Reckoning, the Capital Is Unmade
reckoning_mourncross.flavor: Once you had once unmade Mournhold by Reckoning, six of the procession are unmaking still. End them. The Reckoning will continue.

reckoning_choir_air.name: After the Reckoning, the Choir Has Less to Sing
reckoning_choir_air.flavor: Once you had unmade Mournhold by Reckoning, four censer-shades had less smoke. End them. The smoke will dissipate after.

reckoning_climb_path.name: After the Reckoning, the Climb Has Fewer Stones
reckoning_climb_path.flavor: Once you had unmade Mournhold by Reckoning, a stone-golem on the Climb's path had less stone in him. End him.

warden_witherwood_callback.name: After the Warden, the Wood Lets You Pass
warden_witherwood_callback.flavor: Once you had become the Warden, the wood's pack lead stepped aside for the count it took you to walk past. End him in the count.

warden_mourncross_recognized.name: After the Warden, Mourncross Recognizes
warden_mourncross_recognized.flavor: Once you had become the Warden, two magistrates in Mourncross recognized the keeper-mark on you. End them.
warden_mourncross_recognized.reward_chronicle_line: The two magistrates of Mourncross had recognized the Warden-mark on them; both ended without ceremony.

warden_summit_old_step.name: After the Warden, the Summit Has Heard Your Step
warden_summit_old_step.flavor: Once you had become the Warden, the Summit recognized the previous you's step in your stride. End the new Shadow Warden — the keeper before you has been waiting for this.
warden_summit_old_step.reward_chronicle_line: A previous Warden had returned and ended the Shadow Warden again — the chain of keepers extended by one.

hidden_truth_choir.name: After the Hidden Truth, the Choir Has No Riddle
hidden_truth_choir.flavor: Once you had known the hidden truth, Cantor Vael had no riddle for you. End him. The truth stays known.

hidden_truth_summit.name: After the Hidden Truth, the Summit Meets You Different
hidden_truth_summit.flavor: Once you had known the hidden truth, the Summit met you in a way you did not expect. End the Warden differently than before.

caretaker_gravewatch.name: After the Caretaker, Gravewatch Sets a Chair
caretaker_gravewatch.flavor: Once you had been the Caretaker, Gravewatch sets a chair for you. A bandit on the road tries to take the chair. End him.
caretaker_gravewatch.reward_chronicle_line: A bandit had tried to take the chair Gravewatch had set for the Caretaker; he ended at the road's edge.

other_mournhold_border.name: After the Other Mournhold, the Border Is Open
other_mournhold_border.flavor: Once you had glimpsed the Other Mournhold, the Border was more open than before. A Penitent at the open Border stones notices. End him.

veteran_wood_two_marks.name: The Wood Has Marked You Twice
veteran_wood_two_marks.flavor: The wood has marked you twice — once for the wolf's scent, once for the younger step. A wolf walks who carries both. End it. The wood will know.

veteran_reach_two_marks.name: The Reach Has Marked Your Face and Step
veteran_reach_two_marks.reward_chronicle_line: The Reach had marked their face and their step both; the Reaper knew the doubled marking and fell to it.
veteran_reach_two_marks.flavor: The Reach knows your face and your step. The Reaper walks who reads both. End him. The marks stay.

veteran_holds_grief_doorpost.name: The Holds Recognized Your Grief and a Doorpost
veteran_holds_grief_doorpost.flavor: The Holds know your grief and a doorpost that bore your carving. Two bonesongs sing the doorpost-name. End them. The carving stays carved.

veteran_gullet_double.name: The Gullet Carved You Twice
veteran_gullet_double.flavor: The Gullet marked your skin and breathed your name. A troll wears both readings. End him. The Gullet will be quiet.

veteran_choir_grief_warmth.name: The Choir Warmed for You and Atrél Held Your Grief
veteran_choir_grief_warmth.flavor: The Choir warmed for you. Atrél held your grief briefly. An effigy carries both as relics. End it. Both stay yours.

veteran_climb_dual_print.name: The Climb Has Your Handprint and the Penitent's Naming
veteran_climb_dual_print.reward_chronicle_line: The Penitent's handprint sat under theirs and the Penitent had named them too; they ended the Penitent in the doubled marking, and the prints held.
veteran_climb_dual_print.flavor: His handprint is below yours. He has named you. End him. Both prints stay. Both names stay.

veteran_purify_witherwood_mark.name: After the Purify, the Wood Knew Your Scent Already
veteran_purify_witherwood_mark.flavor: Across runs, the wood knows your scent. Across runs, you have once purified the kingdom. The pack lead knows both. End him.

veteran_atrel_choir_grief.name: After Atrél's Peace, the Choir Already Held the Grief
veteran_atrel_choir_grief.flavor: Across runs, you have set a grief at Atrél's altar. Across runs, you have made Atrél's Peace. Two censer-shades carry the doubled offering. End them.

veteran_reckoning_holds_mark.name: After the Reckoning, the Holds Already Knew
veteran_reckoning_holds_mark.flavor: The Holds blamed you for living. You have unmade Mournhold by Reckoning. Two Red Beards see the doubled marking. End them. The blame becomes the unmaking.

veteran_warden_climb_mark.name: After the Warden, the Climb Knew the Old Step
veteran_warden_climb_mark.flavor: Across runs, the Summit had remembered your old step. Across runs, you had once been the Warden. The Penitent above the snowline sees both readings. End him.

veteran_old_seal_gullet.name: After the Old Seal, the Maw Already Braced
veteran_old_seal_gullet.reward_chronicle_line: The Maw-Mother had braced for them once; they had made The Old Seal once. The doubled stance was hers; the doubled climber took her in it.
veteran_old_seal_gullet.flavor: She has braced for you. You have made The Old Seal. End her. The brace stays a brace.

veteran_hidden_truth_choir_mark.name: After the Hidden Truth, the Choir's Air Was Thinner
veteran_hidden_truth_choir_mark.flavor: Across runs, the Choir's air was thinner for one song of yours. Across runs, you knew the hidden truth. An effigy feels the doubled thinning. End it.

veteran_reborn_purify.name: Reborn After Purify, the Reach Sets a Bench
veteran_reborn_purify.flavor: A previous you had purified the kingdom. The new you arrives and the Reach sets a bench. A thresher took the bench. End it.

veteran_reborn_atrel.name: Reborn After Atrél's Peace, Atrél Remembered
veteran_reborn_atrel.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had made Atrél's Peace; Atrél remembered a grief the new self had set aside, and an effigy fell in the remembering.
veteran_reborn_atrel.flavor: A previous you had made Atrél's Peace. Atrél remembers the grief the new you set aside. End the effigy that wants the grief back.

veteran_reborn_warden.name: Reborn After the Warden, the Summit Recognized
veteran_reborn_warden.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had been the Warden; the new self returned to the Summit, and the Shadow Warden recognized both selves.
veteran_reborn_warden.flavor: A previous you was the Warden. The new you climbs back. The Shadow Warden recognizes both. End the Warden in the doubled recognition.

veteran_reborn_old_seal.name: Reborn After the Old Seal, Mourncross Lit a Lamp
veteran_reborn_old_seal.flavor: A previous you had made The Old Seal. Mourncross lit a lamp for the new you. The Bellward saw the lamp. End her. The lamp stays.

veteran_reborn_hidden_truth.name: Reborn After the Hidden Truth, the Pall Paused
veteran_reborn_hidden_truth.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had known the hidden truth. The new self climbed the Summit, and the Pall paused for them. They ended the Warden in the pause.
veteran_reborn_hidden_truth.flavor: A previous you had known the hidden truth. The new you climbs. The Pall pauses. End the Warden in the pause.

veteran_reborn_reckoning.name: Reborn After the Reckoning, the Holds Were Empty
veteran_reborn_reckoning.flavor: A previous you had unmade Mournhold by Reckoning. The new you arrives at the Holds and the houses are empty. Three doorshuts close at your step. End them. The houses stay empty.

cisterns_a_first.name: The Three Cisterns — The Reach's Drinking
cisterns_a_first.flavor: Two threshers stand at the Reach's first cistern. End them. The Reach's drinking is the first of three the kingdom kept.

cisterns_b_second.name: The Three Cisterns — The Gullet's Throat
cisterns_b_second.flavor: Three slimes thicken the Gullet's throat. End them. The kingdom drank from this throat through six winters.

cisterns_c_third.name: The Three Cisterns — Mourncross's Well
cisterns_c_third.flavor: Three wretches squat at the capital's well. End them. The well is one of three the kingdom kept; this was the last.

cisterns_d_buried.name: The Three Cisterns — The Buried Fourth
cisterns_d_buried.reward_chronicle_line: They walked the kingdom's three cisterns — Reach, Gullet, Mourncross — and found the buried fourth in the Choir. The reliquary golem who guarded it fell.
cisterns_d_buried.flavor: The Choir hid a fourth cistern under its floor. The reliquary golem keeps it. End him. The kingdom will drink again.

verren_a_voice_in_the_tomb.name: Verren's Voice — Hear It in the Bone Tomb
verren_a_voice_in_the_tomb.flavor: Verren's voice is on the Bone Tomb's column of seals. A magistrate carries an echo of it. End him. Verren's voice will be one count clearer.

verren_b_voice_in_the_choir.name: Verren's Voice — Hear It in the Choir
verren_b_voice_in_the_choir.flavor: An effigy in the Choir hums Verren's voice. End it. Verren will be heard in the Choir for the first time in a century.

verren_c_voice_above_snow.name: Verren's Voice — Hear It Above the Snowline
verren_c_voice_above_snow.flavor: Two ice-wraiths above the snowline argue with Verren's voice. End them. Verren will speak in the wind.

verren_d_voice_at_summit.name: Verren's Voice — Carry It to the Summit
verren_d_voice_at_summit.reward_chronicle_line: They carried Verren's voice from the Bone Tomb, through the Choir and above the snowline, and at the Summit they ended the Shadow Warden with the voice in their throat.
verren_d_voice_at_summit.flavor: The Summit's Shadow Warden. End him with Verren's voice in your throat. The kingdom will hear the name.

vigil_a_take_the_lamp.name: The Lampkeeper's Vigil — Take the Lamp
vigil_a_take_the_lamp.flavor: The Lampkeeper at Gravewatch sets out a small lamp for a climber she's worried about. Two bandits at the road's edge had laughed at the lamp. End them. Take the lamp.

vigil_b_wood_trail.name: The Lampkeeper's Vigil — Follow the Trail Through the Wood
vigil_b_wood_trail.flavor: Three wolves walked the trail the missing climber left. End them. The trail will be the missing climber's again.

vigil_c_reach_pool.name: The Lampkeeper's Vigil — At the Reach's Pool
vigil_c_reach_pool.flavor: Two silt-drowners at the Reach's pool — the same pool the missing climber had stopped at. End them. The pool will be still after.

vigil_d_gullet_find.name: The Lampkeeper's Vigil — At the Gullet's Mouth
vigil_d_gullet_find.reward_chronicle_line: They followed the Lampkeeper's lamp from the wood through the Reach to the Gullet's mouth, ended the troll who had taken the missing climber's coat, and the Lampkeeper had her lamp back, and a name to set in her tally.
vigil_d_gullet_find.flavor: A troll at the Gullet's mouth wears the missing climber's coat. End him. Take the coat. The Lampkeeper will know.

disc_atrel_marker_pall.name: The Pall Reads Atrél's Marker
disc_atrel_marker_pall.flavor: Once you have read Atrél's marker, three of Mourncross's procession recognize the gesture. End them.

disc_seal_register_clerk.name: The Clerk's Seal Register and the Library Warden
disc_seal_register_clerk.reward_chronicle_line: They read the clerk's seal register and returned to end the warden whose name was crossed out of it.
disc_seal_register_clerk.flavor: The clerk's seal register names a warden. End that warden. The register stays kept.

mark_holds_bread_warmed.name: After the Holds' Bread Bowl Warmed
mark_holds_bread_warmed.flavor: The Holds' bread bowl warmed once when you passed. Two forager boys want the bread for themselves. End them.

mark_mourn_chair_set.name: After a Chair Was Set for You at Mourncross
mark_mourn_chair_set.flavor: Once a widow at Mourncross set a chair for you. A magistrate wants the chair as evidence. End him.

mark_choir_lost_note_callback.name: After You Lost a Note II
mark_choir_lost_note_callback.flavor: Once you lost a note in the Choir. A censer-shade carries it still. End it. The note will return.

mark_summit_button_left.name: After You Left a Button at the Summit Step
mark_summit_button_left.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had left a button at the Summit step, the Penitent at the upper stone could not refuse them. They ended him.
mark_summit_button_left.flavor: Once you left a button at the Summit step. The Penitent knows the gesture. End him. The button stays.

dh2_after_eron_almost_spoke.name: After Eron Almost Spoke
dh2_after_eron_almost_spoke.reward_chronicle_line: Once a child's voice had almost spoken to them at a doorpost, they returned and ended the two bonesongs that had been carrying the unsaid word.
dh2_after_eron_almost_spoke.flavor: A child's voice almost spoke to you at a doorpost. Two bonesongs swallowed the rest of the word. End them. The word will not come back, but the almost will.

dh2_doorpost_remembered_callback.name: After a Doorpost Remembered a Name
dh2_doorpost_remembered_callback.flavor: A doorpost held the warmth of a hand that was not yours. Three doorshuts want the post to forget. End them. The post will keep remembering.

dh2_street_that_was_a_street.name: After You Walked a Street That Was a Street
dh2_street_that_was_a_street.reward_chronicle_line: They had once walked a lane in the Drowned Holds that was, briefly, a lane again. They returned and ended the reedwife who had washed the lane back into the water.
dh2_street_that_was_a_street.flavor: For a few counts, a lane in the Holds was a lane. A reedwife is washing it back into water. End her. The seeing will stay.

dh2_bread_bowl_warmed_ii.name: The Bread Bowl Warmed for You Twice
dh2_bread_bowl_warmed_ii.flavor: Once the old bread bowl in the kitchen warmed when you passed. Three forager boys are at the bowl now, hands cupped. End them. The bowl will warm a second time.

dh2_forager_boy_brackmere_clay.name: The Forager Boy With Brackmere Clay on His Hands
dh2_forager_boy_brackmere_clay.flavor: One of the forager boys has Brackmere clay caked under his nails. He scratched the bedtime list off a kitchen wall. End him. The list will be a list.

dh2_forager_boy_quiet_kill.name: End the Forager Boy in One Round
dh2_forager_boy_quiet_kill.flavor: Two forager boys. Each ended in one round. The Holds prefer it — the boys did not want a long death. They wanted a quick one and bread.

dh2_forager_boy_named_at_death.name: Name the Forager Boy as He Falls
dh2_forager_boy_named_at_death.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had heard a child's voice almost speak, they returned and named the forager boy as he fell. The Holds carried the name to the doorposts.
dh2_forager_boy_named_at_death.flavor: A forager boy. Speak his name as the killing blow lands. You do not know his name. You say one. The Holds will accept the one you say.

dh2_erons_coat_in_water.name: Eron's Coat, in the Water
dh2_erons_coat_in_water.reward_chronicle_line: A reedwife had been washing a child's coat — Eron's, the Bellward's son — in the wash that was no longer a wash. They ended her. The coat was hung to dry in the wind that was no longer a wind.
dh2_erons_coat_in_water.flavor: A reedwife is washing a small coat at the old wash. It is Eron's. The Bellward's son. End her. The coat will hang in a wind that is almost a wind.

dh2_erons_doorpost.name: Eron's Doorpost
dh2_erons_doorpost.flavor: The doorpost that warmed at your hand was Eron's family doorpost. Two doorshuts keep it shut against the carving. End them. Carve his name. The post will keep it.

dh2_eron_almost_spoke_again.name: The Almost-Hearing, a Second Time
dh2_eron_almost_spoke_again.reward_chronicle_line: The almost-hearing came a second time at the doorpost; they ended four bonesongs that had been pitching against it, and the almost stayed an almost.
dh2_eron_almost_spoke_again.flavor: You hear Eron's voice almost speak a second time. Four bonesongs are pitching against the almost. End them. The almost will hold.

dh2_brackmere_carrots_at_the_ends.name: The Carrots at the Ends
dh2_brackmere_carrots_at_the_ends.flavor: Two reedwives at the wash carry the end-pieces of carrots in their apron-pockets. The Brackmere child wrote about them on day 9. End the reedwives. The child's last meal will be uneaten by them at least.

dh2_brackmere_bedtime_list.name: The Bedtime List, Returned to the Kitchen
dh2_brackmere_bedtime_list.flavor: Three bonesongs hum the bedtime list in their throats — the wrong nights, the wrong meals. End them. The list will go back to the kitchen where the child wrote it.

dh2_brackmere_mama_was_quiet.name: Mama Was Quiet Now
dh2_brackmere_mama_was_quiet.reward_chronicle_line: On day 9, the Brackmere child wrote that Mama was quiet now. They returned to the holds and ended the Red Beard who had refused her the bread.
dh2_brackmere_mama_was_quiet.flavor: A Red Beard from the smith's row — the same row Mama walked from — refused her a slice the day she went quiet. End him. The quiet was not his to keep.

dh2_warrior_door_against_the_water.name: The Warrior's Door Against the Water
dh2_warrior_door_against_the_water.flavor: Four doorshuts have held their doors against the water for a hundred winters. A warrior leans on each one until the door yields back. End them. The lane will be a lane.

dh2_mage_bread_bowl_pitch.name: The Mage's Pitch at the Bread Bowl
dh2_mage_bread_bowl_pitch.flavor: Three bonesongs in the kitchen with the warm bowl. A mage pitches each one against the bowl's small heat. They lose. The bowl warms a third count.

dh2_reborn_forager_carried_your_shard.name: A Forager Boy Who Carried the Previous You's Shard
dh2_reborn_forager_carried_your_shard.reward_chronicle_line: A forager boy in the Drowned Holds carried the brackmere-clay shard a previous one of them had once palmed. The new self returned, ended the boy, and put the shard back in the same pocket.
dh2_reborn_forager_carried_your_shard.flavor: A forager boy carries the shard of pottery a previous you palmed in the kitchen. End him. The shard goes back to the same pocket.

w3_stone_named_the_youngest.name: The Witherwood Stone Names the Youngest Pup
w3_stone_named_the_youngest.flavor: Piranesi's stone names the four younger of this winter's pups by their first kills. End them. The stone will keep the names, and there will be no fifth winter for the line.

w3_stone_names_a_bandit.name: The Stone Knew a Bandit by Name
w3_stone_names_a_bandit.flavor: Piranesi's stone — among the wolf-names — carries two bandits who once carved their own. End them. The stone is for wolves. The carving will wear off.

w3_pet_brings_the_wolves_down.name: Let the Pet Bring the Wolves Down
w3_pet_brings_the_wolves_down.flavor: Three wolves. Your pet lands the blow that drops each one under half hp. The wood watches a pet learn the trick its older cousins forgot.

w3_after_wood_breath_pack_lead.name: After the Wood Held Its Breath — A Pack Lead Knew
w3_after_wood_breath_pack_lead.reward_chronicle_line: The wood had held its breath for them once; the pack lead at the Hunter's Cache had heard the holding, and came to test it. The test failed her.
w3_after_wood_breath_pack_lead.flavor: The wood once held its breath for you. The pack lead at the Hunter's Cache heard the holding and resented it. End her. The wood will breathe again.

w3_goblin_cleric_bless_the_starving.name: The Cleric's Blessing for the Starving
w3_goblin_cleric_bless_the_starving.reward_chronicle_line: A cleric walked the Witherwood and gave six scavvers the small blessing the kingdom had owed them when they were still farmers.
w3_goblin_cleric_bless_the_starving.flavor: Six scavvers. They were farmers once, before the food ran out and they ran upright. Only a cleric remembers to bless them as farmers, not as goblins.

w3_halnas_stump_the_wolf_that_takes_brea.name: The Wolf at Halna's Stump
w3_halnas_stump_the_wolf_that_takes_brea.reward_chronicle_line: They had watched Halna's stump, and the wolf who took her bread; then they took the wolf. Halna folded the cloth again the next morning.
w3_halnas_stump_the_wolf_that_takes_brea.flavor: Old Halna sets bread on the stump. A wolf takes the bread. Not the same wolf each time. One in particular has begun to leave nothing for the rest. End it. Halna will know.

w3_goblin_stun_kill.name: End the Scavvers in the Stagger
w3_goblin_stun_kill.flavor: Four scavvers. Each killing blow lands while the scavver is stunned. The kingdom's old patrolmen did it this way to spare the rest the noise of the dying.

w3_after_wolf_let_you_sleep.name: After the Wolf Let You Sleep
w3_after_wolf_let_you_sleep.reward_chronicle_line: A wolf had once let a ranger sleep in its copse; the next wolf the ranger met carried the same mark, and the ranger ended it kindly.
w3_after_wolf_let_you_sleep.flavor: A wolf let you sleep one night. The next morning, a wolf is here who carries the same scent. Not the same wolf. End it the way the first one would have wanted.

w3_ranger_sworn_takes_the_wolf.name: Let the Sworn Take the Wolf
w3_ranger_sworn_takes_the_wolf.flavor: Two wolves. The ranger reads the trail; the sworn lands the last blow. The wood marks who chose to step aside.

w3_ranger_dodge_then_strike.name: The Ranger's Dodge in the Wood
w3_ranger_dodge_then_strike.flavor: Three wolves. Each killing blow lands on a turn after the ranger dodged. The wood's old hunters did it this way. The wolves did not mind.

w3_reborn_halnas_stump_old_cloth.name: Reborn at Halna's Stump — A Previous Cloth
w3_reborn_halnas_stump_old_cloth.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had folded the cloth at Halna's stump the way Halna folds it. The new self ended the two wolves who had begun to remember the folding.
w3_reborn_halnas_stump_old_cloth.flavor: A previous you had folded the cloth at Halna's stump the way she folds it. Two wolves remember the folding and want the previous you back. End them. The cloth stays folded.

w3_goblin_company_in_the_clearing.name: Scavver Company in the Clearing
w3_goblin_company_in_the_clearing.flavor: Five scavvers have made a small camp in the clearing the stag once used. End them. The clearing will be a clearing again, instead of a camp.

w3_pet_at_the_packs_edge.name: The Pet at the Pack's Edge
w3_pet_at_the_packs_edge.flavor: The pack lead at the Hunter's Cache. Your pet must land the blow that drops her under half. The wood holds its breath when the pet does.

w3_bandit_ambush_at_dusk.name: Cutthroats Named at the Dying
w3_bandit_ambush_at_dusk.flavor: Four bandits along the wood-edge road. Speak each one's first name as the killing blow lands. The road's old patrolmen kept the names for the keeping.

w3_bandit_clean_first_strike.name: The Wood-Edge Ambush — First Blow Yours
w3_bandit_clean_first_strike.flavor: Three bandits where the road bends under the wood-edge. The first blow in each fight is yours. The cutthroats had been waiting.

w3_halnas_stump_pack_circles.name: The Pack That Began to Circle Halna's Stump
w3_halnas_stump_pack_circles.flavor: After the one wolf you took, three of its pack began to circle the stump in its place. End them. Halna's bread is for the wolves who know the cloth, not the wolves who did not.

da_after_piranesi_choir_column.name: After Piranesi's Choir Column
da_after_piranesi_choir_column.flavor: Piranesi drew the column of the Choir and named the golem at its base in pencil. End it. The column can lose a name; the Choir can lose a step.

da_after_piranesi_holds_doorpost.name: After Piranesi's Doorpost
da_after_piranesi_holds_doorpost.flavor: Piranesi wrote names on the doorpost no living scribe had a right to. One bonesong sings them now. End it. The doorpost will go quiet.

da_after_erons_doorpost.name: After Eron's Doorpost
da_after_erons_doorpost.flavor: Eron carved his name low on the doorpost, in a child's hand. One forager-boy walks the lane with the same hand. End him. Eron's name will be the only one left low.

da_after_piranesi_mourncross_square.name: After Piranesi's Square
da_after_piranesi_mourncross_square.flavor: Piranesi drew the square the year the census was burned. One hollow procession still walks it on the same line he drew. End the line.

da_after_atrel_register.name: After Atrél's Register
da_after_atrel_register.flavor: Atrél kept a register under the side altar — the names the Magistrates struck out. End the Magistrate who held the pen. The register can be re-read by a kinder voice.

da_after_piranesi_cave_stone.name: After Piranesi's Cave Stone
da_after_piranesi_cave_stone.flavor: Piranesi sketched the cave stone with a troll's tooth-mark on it. End the troll. The stone will lose the mark.

da_after_last_dyke_lore.name: After the Last Dyke's Older Name
da_after_last_dyke_lore.reward_chronicle_line: They learned the dyke's older name and ended the Warden who guarded the newer one. The stone could be re-carved.
da_after_last_dyke_lore.flavor: The Last Dyke had an older name. The Warden answers only to the newer one. End him. The older name can be carved over the newer.

da_after_piranesi_reach_birds.name: After Piranesi's Birds
da_after_piranesi_reach_birds.flavor: Piranesi drew three birds over the floodfields and named none. Three lurchers wear feathers the same colour. End them. The birds will be named by the silence after.

da_after_famine_waterwheel_song.name: After the Waterwheel Song
da_after_famine_waterwheel_song.reward_chronicle_line: They heard the waterwheel song and put the Last Reaper down. The wheel turned once after, and was still.
da_after_famine_waterwheel_song.flavor: The waterwheel song names the Last Reaper in its second verse. End him. The song can have a final verse you write in silence.

da_after_tace_last_bundle.name: After Tace's Last Bundle
da_after_tace_last_bundle.flavor: Tace's last bundle is by the doorpost, unopened. Two reedwives sang the night she set it down. End them. Someone alive can open the bundle now.

da_after_famine_capital_letter.name: After the Famine Letter
da_after_famine_capital_letter.flavor: The capital letter on the famine page is a B and stops there. Two silt-drowners came up the river the night that B was written. End them. The letter can be finished by another hand.

da_after_drowned_holds_petition.name: After the Drowned Petition
da_after_drowned_holds_petition.flavor: The petition was pushed under a door that had been shut for years. Two doorshuts now hold the names of the petitioners in their hinges. End them. The names can come out.

da_after_atrel_side_altar.name: After Atrél's Side Altar
da_after_atrel_side_altar.flavor: Atrél's side altar has two censer-shades that came when the main altar was loud. End them. The side altar can be quiet again, the way Atrél kept it.

da_after_reach_tally.name: After the Reach Tally
da_after_reach_tally.flavor: The Reach tally has three names in the lost column. Three threshers wear those names on their backs in salt. End them. The column can be closed.

da_after_piranesi_reach_furrow.name: After Piranesi's Furrow
da_after_piranesi_reach_furrow.flavor: Piranesi drew the furrow with a thresher's footprint in it twice. End the two threshers who left them. The furrow will dry in the shape of a feet that left.

da_after_gullet_alcove.name: After the Gullet's Alcove
da_after_gullet_alcove.flavor: The Gullet's alcove holds three roosting bats older than the Pall. End them. The alcove can hold something kinder for a while.

da_after_insomniac_tally.name: After the Insomniac's Tally
da_after_insomniac_tally.flavor: Two strokes on the Insomniac's tally are wolves that came off the wood last night and did not go back. End them. The tally can end two short.

da_after_halnas_stump.name: After Halna's Stump
da_after_halnas_stump.flavor: Halna sat on this stump once and the wolves did not come for her. Two have come for it since. End them. The stump will be sat on again.

hc2_dyke_chain_a_read_the_order.name: The Last Dyke — Read the Closed-Gate Order
hc2_dyke_chain_a_read_the_order.flavor: The closed-gate order has been read. End the warden who held it. The chain of holding will be shorter by one warden.

hc2_reborn_dyke_closed_gate_order.name: A Closed-Gate Order a Previous You Could Not Forge
hc2_reborn_dyke_closed_gate_order.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had read the closed-gate order and could not forge the word 'enough'. The new self ended the warden instead.
hc2_reborn_dyke_closed_gate_order.flavor: A previous you read the closed-gate order and could not add 'enough'. The new you ends the warden who held it. The forging is moot now.

hc2_dyke_warden_no_abilities.name: The Capital Way — Plain Steel at the Dyke
hc2_dyke_warden_no_abilities.flavor: The capital-sworn engineers fought with what their hands knew. End her with no ability spent. The capital's way ends with her.

hc2_dyke_chain_b_one_round.name: The Last Dyke — End Her in a Single Round
hc2_dyke_chain_b_one_round.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had read the order, they ended the warden in a single round. The capital's writ stopped being read at the dyke.
hc2_dyke_chain_b_one_round.flavor: You have read the order. End the warden in a single round. The capital's hand stops at the dyke today. The water will know.

hc2_after_dyke_name_carved.name: After You Carved a Name on the Dyke
hc2_after_dyke_name_carved.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had carved a warden's initial into the dyke stone, the next warden's letter went under the first. Two letters. Both kept.
hc2_after_dyke_name_carved.flavor: You have carved one warden's initial into the dyke. Carve the next under it. End her. Two letters now, both kept by the stone.

hc2_after_halnas_stag.name: After You Saw Halna's Stag
hc2_after_halnas_stag.flavor: You have seen Halna's drawing of the stag she let walk. The pack lead at the cache has not been let walk. End him. The drawing stays.

hc2_ranger_pack_lead_quiet_kill.name: A Ranger's Kill at the Hunter's Cache
hc2_ranger_pack_lead_quiet_kill.flavor: The cache was a ranger's place before it was a wolf's. End the pack lead with the first strike yours. Halna will know the shape.

hc2_reborn_cache_tally.name: An Unmarked Line on Halna's Tally
hc2_reborn_cache_tally.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had read Halna's tally; the new self came back and ended the pack lead, and the last unmarked line was crossed.
hc2_reborn_cache_tally.flavor: A previous you read Halna's tally and did not finish the count. The new you finishes. End the pack lead. The last line crosses out.

hc2_pack_lead_in_one_round.name: The Pack Lead in a Single Round
hc2_pack_lead_in_one_round.flavor: End the pack lead in one round. The cache will open quieter than it has ever opened. The wolves in the wood will hear the quiet.

hc2_warrior_pack_lead_head_on.name: A Warrior's Fight at the Cache
hc2_warrior_pack_lead_head_on.flavor: A warrior's fight at the cache. No poultice spent, no draught swallowed. End him on the blood you brought in. Halna will count.

hc2_warden_ending_dyke_recognizes.name: After the Warden, the Dyke Recognizes a Keeper
hc2_warden_ending_dyke_recognizes.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had become the Warden, the dyke-warden recognised the keeper-mark on them and gave one nod before the fight; the fight ended.
hc2_warden_ending_dyke_recognizes.flavor: Across runs, you have been the Warden. The dyke-warden recognises the keeper-mark on you. She nods once. End her. The post is yours after.

hc2_pack_lead_no_abilities.name: Halna's Way — Plain Steel at the Cache
hc2_pack_lead_no_abilities.flavor: End the pack lead with no ability spent. Halna's father did it this way the first time, and she did it this way the second time.

hc2_pack_lead_no_damage.name: Untouched by the Pack Lead
hc2_pack_lead_no_damage.reward_chronicle_line: They ended the Hunter's Cache pack lead without a tooth in them. Halna's tally got a final unmarked line, struck through clean.
hc2_pack_lead_no_damage.flavor: The pack lead, ended without a tooth landing on you. Halna will see no blood on you when you walk back. She will not say so.

hc2_after_dyke_held_water.name: After the Water Paused for You
hc2_after_dyke_held_water.flavor: The water has paused for you, once. End the warden again. The water will pause again. The dyke remembers the dry foot it gave you.

hc2_dyke_warden_no_damage.name: Untouched at the Last Dyke
hc2_dyke_warden_no_damage.flavor: The dyke-warden, ended without a finger on you. The held water behind her will not get a finger on you either. The boots stay dry.

hc2_after_cache_strap_for_you.name: After the Cache Set a Strap Aside for You
hc2_after_cache_strap_for_you.flavor: The cache has set a strap aside for your wrist. The pack lead smells the new wrist on the next visit. End him. The strap stays.

hc2_dyke_warden_in_one_round_after_pause.name: A Single Round, After She Almost Let You Through
hc2_dyke_warden_in_one_round_after_pause.reward_chronicle_line: She had almost let them through, once. They returned and ended her in a single round. The post she had kept stayed kept in the silence.
hc2_dyke_warden_in_one_round_after_pause.flavor: Once she almost let you through. Now end her in a single round. The post she kept will be quieter than she kept it.

hc2_after_cache_button_pairs.name: After the Cache Returned Your Father's Button
hc2_after_cache_button_pairs.reward_chronicle_line: The cache had returned a button of their father's; they wore it into the fight, and the pack lead ended at the second nail.
hc2_after_cache_button_pairs.flavor: You carry a button your father lost when you were small. The pack lead can smell the older coat on you. End him. The button stays.

gw_after_insomniac_long_line.name: The Long Black Line
gw_after_insomniac_long_line.flavor: The long black line on the Insomniac's beam is the nights she has not slept. Four goblins, by their noise outside her window, are why the line is one count taller than it would be. End them. The line will stop where it is, for one night.

gw_hearthkeeper_limp_remembered.name: The Limp the Hearthkeeper Noticed
gw_hearthkeeper_limp_remembered.flavor: The Hearthkeeper moved your cup an inch for your bad leg. Two bandits on the road know the limp and think it is a weakness. End them. The cup will be where it should be tomorrow.

gw_lamp2_you_lit_a_lamp.name: After You Lit One of the Crossroads Lamps
gw_lamp2_you_lit_a_lamp.flavor: The lampkeeper let you light one of the Crossroads lamps yourself. Three bandits walk under the lamp at night and do not look up. End them. The lamp leans toward you when you arrive. The lamp knows.

gw_smith_first_upgrade_bandits.name: Bandits on the Road, the Day the Smith Took Your Coin
gw_smith_first_upgrade_bandits.flavor: The smith took your coin and bent the metal. Three bandits on the road heard the coin clink. They want it back. They will not have it. End them. The bent metal was worth the noise.

gw_small_altar_one_cruelty.name: After the Small Altar — One Cruelty Brought
gw_small_altar_one_cruelty.reward_chronicle_line: They had read the small altar at Gravewatch and decided to bring Atrél one cruelty given to a child on the road; one bandit ended for it, and the altar held the bringing.
gw_small_altar_one_cruelty.flavor: The small altar's last line — 'Brought: one cruelty given to my son.' — names a bandit on the Witherwood road. End him. The line will read: 'Brought, kept.' Atrél will hold it.

gw_smith_quenched_for_you.name: After the Smith Quenched a Blade for You to See
gw_smith_quenched_for_you.flavor: Gravewatch's smith held a blade in the trough a count too long for you to see. The lesson took. Three bandits on the road will learn the quench from your hand. End them. The smith will not say. She will know.

gw_caretaker_late_round.name: The Caretaker's Late Round
gw_caretaker_late_round.flavor: The Caretaker of Gravewatch walks the doors after the Hearthkeeper shuts the hearth. Three goblins in the wood have been keeping her round longer than it should be. End them. The Caretaker will finish her round at the hour she used to.

gw_readers_pencil_kinder_use.name: The Reader's Pencil, Sharpened for a Kinder Use
gw_readers_pencil_kinder_use.flavor: The Reader has sharpened the pencil again, for a kinder use. One more warden in the Burned Library would not let the kinder use be. End him. The Reader will set the pencil down. The kindness will be a written kindness.

gw_after_saved_at_gravewatch_twice.name: After You Saved at Gravewatch a Second Time
gw_after_saved_at_gravewatch_twice.flavor: The first save is a saving. The second is a return. Two wolves in the wood notice the returning. End them. The kingdom marks the coming-back the way it marks the going-out.

gw_hidden_insomniac_dark_or_light.name: Dark Mark or Light Mark
gw_hidden_insomniac_dark_or_light.flavor: The Insomniac will know one day whether you are a dark mark or a light one. Three wolves at the wood-edge are pacing the decision toward light. End them. The decision will go where she expects.

gw_after_insomniac_red_mark.name: The Red Mark in the Middle of the Beam
gw_after_insomniac_red_mark.flavor: The Insomniac's red marks are climbers she does not know yet — have-not-come-back, but have-not-stopped-not-coming-back. Three wolves are why one of those climbers has not come back yet. End them. The red mark will turn one shade darker.

gw_hearthkeeper_no_potions.name: Bread Is Enough — No Potions in the Wood
gw_hearthkeeper_no_potions.flavor: The Hearthkeeper packs three rounds of bread for the wood, the day you tell her you will not carry potions. End three goblins in the wood without uncorking a single flask. The bread will be enough. She would say so, if she said anything.

gw_insomniac_blue_cat.name: The Cat on the Windowsill
gw_insomniac_blue_cat.flavor: The Insomniac has counted five blue marks for the same cat she thinks were different cats. Two wolves are why the cat does not come to the sill anymore. End them. The cat will be a sixth blue mark next week.

gw_readers_pencil_no_damage.name: The Reader's Pencil — End Him Without a Mark on You
gw_readers_pencil_no_damage.flavor: The Reader does not flinch when they read. End the next warden without taking a hit. The Reader will note it in the margin — not in praise, only in record. The pencil keeps what is true.

gw_after_insomniac_named_you.name: After the Insomniac Counted You
gw_after_insomniac_named_you.flavor: The Insomniac of Gravewatch counted you among the dark marks — the climbers who came back this winter. Two bandits on the road do not know she counts. End them. She will know the count was right.

gw_hearthkeeper_bread_bowl.name: Bread for the Hearth, Wolves Off the Sheep
gw_hearthkeeper_bread_bowl.flavor: The Hearthkeeper bakes by the count of sheep the wolves leave her. Five wolves have made her short of mutton-fat for the loaves this winter. End them. The bread will rise the way it used to.

cz_wanderer_b_reach.name: The Wanderer's Letter — At the Reach Furrow
cz_wanderer_b_reach.flavor: The second drop was at a furrow in the Sodden Reach — three threshers turn the silt where she set the letter down to rest her arm. End them. The page beneath their boots is the second leaf of four.

cz_pilgrim_d_climb.name: The Pilgrim's Stations — A Penitent on the Climb
cz_pilgrim_d_climb.reward_chronicle_line: They walked the pilgrim's four stations — door, gate, altar, cairn — and the kingdom remembered what the walking was for.
cz_pilgrim_d_climb.flavor: The fourth station is the cairn at the Climb's last bend, where pilgrims set down their token and turned for home. The Penitent who never turned home stands at it now. End them. The cairn has waited a long time to be a cairn again.

cz_bounty_hollow_bellward_cross.name: The Bell That Crossed Four Zones
cz_bounty_hollow_bellward_cross.flavor: The Bellward's curfew bell was rung at sundown in Mourncross, and the holds heard it across the Reach, and the wood heard it through its branches, and the Gullet caught the last echo. Four zones, one bell. End the Bellward once more. The bell will stop crossing the kingdom at sundown.

cz_kingdoms_reliquary.name: The Reliquary That Was a Hold's Box
cz_kingdoms_reliquary.flavor: The reliquary the Choir guards was carried up from a Brackmere hold the winter the gates closed. It held a saint's finger once. It holds nothing now. The golem keeps it anyway. End it. The hold can have its box back, empty though it will be.

cz_bounty_red_beard_cross.name: The Smith Who Started for the Capital
cz_bounty_red_beard_cross.flavor: Red Beard set out from Brackmere with his anvil-hammer. He meant to walk through the Reach, past the dykes, to Mourncross. The river took him in the third bend. The walk is what is left. Take him once more, where the walk ended. The kingdom that closed its gate will know one more man tried.

cz_kingdoms_procession.name: The Procession That Crossed Three Streets
cz_kingdoms_procession.flavor: A funeral that set out from the drowned holds, walked through the Gullet, and arrived in Mourncross with no body to bury. Two such processions still walk that route. End them. The kingdom will be one less funeral that never ended.

cz_wanderer_d_climb.name: The Wanderer's Letter — On the Ashen Climb
cz_wanderer_d_climb.reward_chronicle_line: They walked the wanderer's letter from the wood to the climb — four leaves, four zones, one woman who had carried them as far as she could.
cz_wanderer_d_climb.flavor: The fourth leaf is on the Climb. The grey snow has half-buried it. Two hollow wraiths circle the cairn where she set it last. End them. Read the last leaf. Carry the letter to the hold it was meant for — it is not there, but the walk is the answer.

cz_bounty_last_reaper.name: The Reaper Whose Name the Kingdom Remembers
cz_bounty_last_reaper.flavor: The Last Reaper is named in three kingdom records — the Reach's tally, the Mourncross census, and the Choir's list of the unforgiven. End her once more, for the records that still know her name. The kingdom will be one less name on three lists.

cz_pilgrim_a_holds.name: The Pilgrim's Stations — A Doorshut in the Drowned Holds
cz_pilgrim_a_holds.flavor: Pilgrims used to walk four stations from holds to summit, one prayer at each. The first station was a hold-door. The doorshut who stands at it now is the prayer turned away. End her. Set the first station back where it stood.

cz_wanderer_c_gullet.name: The Wanderer's Letter — In the Gullet's Mouth
cz_wanderer_c_gullet.flavor: The third leaf is in the Gullet's throat — she dropped it the morning the cave-cold first hit her lungs. Two creeping rots have grown over it. Take them. Lift the page out. It is half-eaten and the half that survives is the half that mattered.

cz_bounty_cantor_vael_cross.name: The Cantor Whose Voice Crossed the Kingdom
cz_bounty_cantor_vael_cross.flavor: Cantor Vael's rite was sung at the Choir, but the unremembering reached every zone — Witherwood, Reach, Holds, Gullet, Mourncross, Climb. Take him once more. The voice that crossed the kingdom will stop crossing it.

cz_pilgrim_b_mourncross.name: The Pilgrim's Stations — A Magistrate in Mourncross
cz_pilgrim_b_mourncross.flavor: The second station was the capital's gate — where the pilgrim showed their token and was let through. A Pall-sworn magistrate keeps the gate now. Take him. The second station's stone is in his pocket. He has held it three winters too long.

cz_wanderer_a_wood.name: The Wanderer's Letter — At the Witherwood Crossing
cz_wanderer_a_wood.flavor: A wanderer crossed the kingdom once with a single letter in her pack, meant for a sister in a hold that no longer answered. She dropped it four times. The first drop was a wood-trail; two wolves are at it now. Bring them down. Pick up the page she left behind.

cz_kingdoms_thresher.name: The Thresher the Whole Kingdom Saw
cz_kingdoms_thresher.flavor: Four threshers walked, in the seventh winter, from the Reach to the Witherwood, and the wood saw them, and the Gullet heard them, and Mourncross did not look. Take the four. The kingdom that did not look will get a chance to look again.

cz_kingdoms_silt_drowner.name: The Drowner That Walked the Whole Reach
cz_kingdoms_silt_drowner.flavor: Five drowners — each from a different broken sluice along the Reach, each carrying a different hold's name on her hem. End them. Five sluices will know they have been emptied of their keeper. The kingdom will know its drowning was many.

cz_pilgrim_c_choir.name: The Pilgrim's Stations — A Shade in the Choir
cz_pilgrim_c_choir.flavor: The third station was at the cathedral side-altar — where Atrél once held the pilgrim's smallest grief. Two censer-shades have crowded the altar out. End them. The third station is the bowl beneath their feet. It is upturned. Set it right.

lg_summit_warden_again.name: The Summit Warden, Again
lg_summit_warden_again.flavor: The Shadow Warden has been ended many times. The kingdom has stopped counting. End him once more. The kingdom will count this one.
lg_summit_warden_again.reward_chronicle_line: The Summit Warden ended for what the kingdom no longer counted — and the count began again.

lg_maw_mother_late.name: The Maw-Mother in the Late Quiet
lg_maw_mother_late.flavor: The Maw-Mother is hungrier in the cleansed kingdom; there is less to eat. End her. The Gullet will be only the Gullet after.

lg_cantor_vael_last_breath.name: Cantor Vael's Last Breath
lg_cantor_vael_last_breath.flavor: The Cantor has been singing for a hundred winters. The cleansed kingdom hears him quieter. End him. The third line will hold.
lg_cantor_vael_last_breath.reward_chronicle_line: Cantor Vael's last breath went into the air the cleansed kingdom had been quieting toward — and the air held the breath.

lg_hollow_bellward_last_ring.name: The Hollow Bellward's Last Ring
lg_hollow_bellward_last_ring.flavor: The Bellward has been ringing the bell for a hundred winters. The cleansed kingdom hears the bell from far. End her. The bell will find a new ringer or none.

lg_after_summit_listened.name: After the Summit Started to Listen
lg_after_summit_listened.flavor: The Summit started to listen for you once. Two Penitents above the snowline keep the listening. End them. The Summit's listening will be yours alone.

lg_after_pall_paused.name: After the Pall Paused for You
lg_after_pall_paused.flavor: The Pall paused for you once. The new Shadow Warden does not. End him. The Pall will pause again — or it will not.
lg_after_pall_paused.reward_chronicle_line: The Pall had paused for them once; the new Warden did not, and they ended the Warden, and the Pall paused longer.

lg_after_summit_named.name: After You Named Someone to the Summit Wind
lg_after_summit_named.flavor: You named someone to the Summit wind once. Four ice-wraiths carry the name still. End them. The name will return to its owner.

lg_after_lung_marked.name: After the Climb Marked Your Lungs
lg_after_lung_marked.flavor: The Climb marked your lungs once. Three ogres on the bare ridge feel the marking. End them. The lungs will be lungs after.

lg_purify_then_warden.name: After Purify + Warden, the Capital Has No Reverence
lg_purify_then_warden.flavor: Across runs, the player has both purified Mournhold and become its Warden. The Bellward at the high bell has no reverence left for either. End her.
lg_purify_then_warden.reward_chronicle_line: The kingdom that had been purified and then warded met its Hollow Bellward with no reverence; the bell rang only briefly.

lg_old_seal_plus_atrel.name: After Old Seal + Atrél's Peace, the Choir Lays Down
lg_old_seal_plus_atrel.flavor: Across runs, the player has made both The Old Seal and Atrél's Peace. Cantor Vael, who has been singing the rite forever, lays down his voice when you enter. End him in the laying-down.

lg_reckoning_then_purify.name: After Reckoning, Then Purify, the Summit Listens Different
lg_reckoning_then_purify.flavor: Across runs, the player has both unmade Mournhold (Reckoning) AND rebuilt it (Purify). The Summit's listening is changed by the order. End the Warden in the changed listening.
lg_reckoning_then_purify.reward_chronicle_line: The Summit had listened to a climber who had both unmade and rebuilt the kingdom — and the listening changed the kill.

lg_three_endings_summit.name: The Triple-Endings Summit
lg_three_endings_summit.flavor: Three endings stacked in the Chronicle — the player has done three different kinds of work for Mournhold. The Summit recognizes the triple-weight. End the Warden in the triple recognition.
lg_three_endings_summit.reward_chronicle_line: They had purified, become the Warden, and made the Old Seal — across three runs. The Summit ended for them differently than for anyone else.

lg_reborn_summit_keeper.name: A Reborn Keeper Returns to the Summit
lg_reborn_summit_keeper.flavor: A previous self had been the Summit Warden once. The new self climbs back. The Warden recognizes the old gait. End him in the recognition.
lg_reborn_summit_keeper.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had been the Summit Warden; the new self returned and ended the new Warden in the chain of keepers.

lg_reborn_choir_silence.name: A Reborn Climber Finds the Choir Silent
lg_reborn_choir_silence.flavor: A previous self had ended Cantor Vael. The new self finds the Choir silent. Two effigies still raise their voices. End them. The Choir will be silent.

lg_reborn_unwarden.name: A Reborn Climber Refuses the Warden
lg_reborn_unwarden.flavor: A previous self had been the Warden. The new self refuses the role. A Penitent above the snowline tries to gently remind. End him. The refusal stays a refusal.
lg_reborn_unwarden.reward_chronicle_line: A previous one of them had been the Warden; the new self refused, and the Penitent who would have welcomed the warden-back fell to the refusal.

lg_cleric_last_funeral.name: The Cleric's Last Funeral
lg_cleric_last_funeral.flavor: Seven of the procession. A cleric gives each a proper funeral. The cleansed Mourncross will be one count quieter for the work.
lg_cleric_last_funeral.reward_chronicle_line: A cleric walked the cleansed Mourncross and gave seven of the procession a proper funeral — and the capital was quieter.

lg_mage_summit_song.name: The Mage's Summit Song
lg_mage_summit_song.flavor: A Penitent above the snowline. Only a mage knows the pitch that ends a Penitent in the cleansed kingdom. End him.

lg_warrior_summit_step.name: The Warrior's Step Onto the Summit
lg_warrior_summit_step.flavor: The Shadow Warden in the cleansed kingdom expects honor. Only a warrior's foot weighs enough to give it. End him.

gw2_lamp2_first_name.name: After You Heard the Lampkeeper's First Name
gw2_lamp2_first_name.flavor: The Lampkeeper told you her first name once. Two wolves of the wood have learned the name. End them. The name stays the Lampkeeper's.

gw2_lamp2_which_lamp.name: After You Learned Which Lamp Remembers Who
gw2_lamp2_which_lamp.flavor: The Lampkeeper showed you which lamp remembers which climber. Three bandits on the road tested the remembering. End them. The lamps know.

gw2_lampkeeper_recognised.name: After the Lampkeeper Recognised You
gw2_lampkeeper_recognised.flavor: The Lampkeeper recognised you on your return. Three carrion bats took the recognition as the day's name. End them.

gw2_lamp_handed_drawing.name: After the Lampkeeper Handed You Her Drawing
gw2_lamp_handed_drawing.flavor: The Lampkeeper handed you a drawing she had made of a climber she'd lost. Four goblins are between you and the place in the drawing. End them. The drawing will arrive.
gw2_lamp_handed_drawing.reward_chronicle_line: The Lampkeeper had handed them a drawing of a lost climber; the place in it was reached by ending four goblins between Gravewatch and the spot.

gw2_lampkeeper_will_not_look.name: After the Lampkeeper Would Not Look Up
gw2_lampkeeper_will_not_look.flavor: The Lampkeeper did not look up at you once. A bandit on the road noticed her not looking. End him. She will look up next time.

gw2_hearth2_room.name: After the Hearthkeeper Gave You a Room
gw2_hearth2_room.flavor: The Hearthkeeper gave you a room for free one night. Three wolves of the wood smelled the warmth. End them. The next free night is yours.

gw2_hearth2_breakfast.name: After the Hearthkeeper Kept a Breakfast for You
gw2_hearth2_breakfast.flavor: A breakfast had been kept for you at the hearth. Two bandits had hoped it was theirs. End them. The breakfast keeps.

gw2_hearth2_chair_by_fire.name: After the Hearthkeeper Set a Chair by the Fire
gw2_hearth2_chair_by_fire.flavor: A chair by the fire was set out for you. Three goblins were of the kind who would push it back. End them. The chair stays where it sits.

gw2_hearth2_winter_story.name: After You Heard the Winter Story at the Hearth
gw2_hearth2_winter_story.flavor: The Hearthkeeper told you about the winter at Gravewatch — the year the kettle never quite cooled. Two threshers in the Reach know the story too. End them. The kettle keeps its warmth.

gw2_hearthkeeper_book_open.name: After the Hearthkeeper Left the Book Open to Your Page
gw2_hearthkeeper_book_open.flavor: The Hearthkeeper left her book open to a page about you. A library-warden wanted the page for the Pall's records. End him. The page stays in the Hearthkeeper's book.

gw2_cat_brought_mouse.name: After the Hearth-Cat Brought You a Mouse
gw2_cat_brought_mouse.flavor: Gravewatch's hearth-cat brought you a mouse. Three wolves of the wood considered the gesture an offering. End them. The cat will know.
gw2_cat_brought_mouse.reward_chronicle_line: A village cat had brought a mouse to a climber; three wolves at the wood's edge fell for misreading the gesture.

gw2_cat_curled_at_grief.name: After the Hearth-Cat Curled at Your Grief
gw2_cat_curled_at_grief.flavor: A village cat curled at the grief you set down. One of the procession in Mourncross noticed the easing. End it.

gw2_cat_taught_hour_off.name: After the Hearth-Cat Taught You to Take an Hour Off
gw2_cat_taught_hour_off.flavor: A village cat taught you to take an hour off. Two bandits had not been taught the same lesson. End them. The hour will be yours.

gw2_insomniac_counted_cat.name: After the Insomniac Counted Your Cat
gw2_insomniac_counted_cat.flavor: The Insomniac of Gravewatch counted a cat as yours. Two wolves had thought the cat was theirs. End them. The count holds.

gw2_insomniac_not_today.name: After the Insomniac Refused to Count You Today
gw2_insomniac_not_today.flavor: The Insomniac decided not to count you today. A bandit on the road decided you were therefore not counted at all. End him. The count resumes tomorrow.

gw2_mage_lamp_lit.name: After a Lamp Lit Without You Saying
gw2_mage_lamp_lit.flavor: A lamp lit at Gravewatch without you saying. An effigy in the Choir had set the unsaying. End it. The lamp will continue to light.

gw2_warden_lampkeeper_called.name: After the Lampkeeper Called You Warden
gw2_warden_lampkeeper_called.flavor: Across runs, you had been the Warden once. The Lampkeeper still calls you that. End the new Shadow Warden — the Lampkeeper's word will stay the word.
gw2_warden_lampkeeper_called.reward_chronicle_line: A Lampkeeper had called them Warden across runs; the new Shadow Warden ended for the name, and the Lampkeeper kept using it.

br_karst_bird_circled.name: After a Bird Circled Three Times at Karst
br_karst_bird_circled.flavor: A bird circled three times above the Karst Outpost while you stood there. Two ice-wraiths above the snowline counted the circling. End them. The bird will circle for someone else next time.

br_karst_chair_facing.name: After a Chair Was Set Facing Yours at Karst
br_karst_chair_facing.flavor: A chair at Karst had been set facing yours, briefly. A Penitent above the snowline noticed the facing. End him. The chair stays.

br_karst_kettle_warm.name: After the Karst Kettle Was Still Warm
br_karst_kettle_warm.flavor: The kettle at Karst was still warm when you arrived. Two ogres on the bare ridge knew the warmth was meant for you. End them.

br_karst_emissary_token.name: After You Held an Old Emissary's Token at Karst
br_karst_emissary_token.flavor: An old emissary's token was in your hand at Karst. A stone-golem at the upper step remembered the emissary. End him.
br_karst_emissary_token.reward_chronicle_line: An old emissary's token had passed through their hand at Karst; the stone-golem above the snowline fell to the remembering.

br_karst_lookout.name: After the Karst Lookout Remembered You
br_karst_lookout.flavor: The Karst lookout remembered you. Three ice-wraiths above the snow-line had been the lookout's friends once. End them.

br_margrave_bell_left.name: After a Bell Rang When You Left the Margrave's Monument
br_margrave_bell_left.flavor: A bell rang when you left the Margrave's Monument. The Margrave Censor rang it. End him. The bell will be a bell again.

br_margrave_writ.name: After You Carried an Old Writ from the Margrave
br_margrave_writ.flavor: An old writ from the Margrave was in your pocket. A magistrate in Mourncross wanted to read it. End him. The writ stays sealed.

br_margrave_stone_softened.name: After the Margrave Stone Softened to Your Kneel
br_margrave_stone_softened.flavor: The Margrave's stone softened to your kneel. The Censor felt the softening. End him. The stone will keep the kneel.
br_margrave_stone_softened.reward_chronicle_line: The Margrave's stone had softened to their kneel; the Censor ended in the soft place, and the kneel stayed.

br_wynne_post_message.name: After a Message Was Carved in the Wynne Post
br_wynne_post_message.flavor: A message for you had been carved in the Wynne Camp post. The Devoured Captain had read it before you. End him.

br_wynne_song_wind.name: After a Song Carried on the Wynne Wind
br_wynne_song_wind.flavor: A song carried on the wind at Wynne. Two ice-wraiths above the snow-line had been the song's singers. End them. The song stays carried.

br_wynne_arrowhead.name: After an Arrowhead Was in the Wynne Post
br_wynne_arrowhead.flavor: An arrowhead was set into the Wynne Camp post. Three bandits on the road had been its previous targets. End them.

br_wynne_fire_circle.name: After the Wynne Fire Circle Had Room
br_wynne_fire_circle.flavor: The Wynne Camp fire circle had room for you, briefly. The Devoured Captain remembered the room. End him.

br_air_changed.name: After the Border Air Changed
br_air_changed.flavor: The Border air changed when you crossed it. The Pre-Pall Shrine Keeper felt the change. End him. The Border will keep the change.

br_signpost_pointed.name: After the Border Signpost Pointed at You
br_signpost_pointed.flavor: The Border signpost pointed at you. Three censer-shades in the Choir took the pointing as a name. End them. The signpost rests.

br_signpost_back_home.name: After the Karst Signpost Pointed Back Home
br_signpost_back_home.flavor: The Karst signpost pointed back toward home. Four wolves of the wood knew the direction. End them. The way home stays.
br_signpost_back_home.reward_chronicle_line: A signpost at Karst had pointed back toward home; four wolves at the wood's edge had been making the way longer.

br_margrave_seal_softened.name: After the Margrave Monument's Seal Softened in Your Hand
br_margrave_seal_softened.flavor: The Margrave's seal softened in your hand. The Shadow Warden at the Summit knew the softening. End him.

br_karst_lookout_for_you.name: After Karst Outpost Kept a Lookout for You
br_karst_lookout_for_you.flavor: The Karst Outpost kept a lookout for you across runs. Two Penitents above the snowline knew the lookout. End them.

br_wynne_kettle_warm.name: After the Wynne Kettle Was Still Warm
br_wynne_kettle_warm.flavor: The Wynne kettle was still warm. The Devoured Captain remembered drinking from it. End him. The kettle stays warm.
br_wynne_kettle_warm.reward_chronicle_line: The Wynne kettle had stayed warm for them across runs; the Devoured Captain ended, and the kettle held its heat.

cr3_climb_save_dream.name: After You Dreamt of Finishing the Climb Well
cr3_climb_save_dream.flavor: You dreamt of finishing the climb well after a save. A Penitent above the snowline knew the dream. End him.

cr3_climb_pall_farewell.name: After the Pall Said Farewell with Your Step Facing Summit
cr3_climb_pall_farewell.flavor: The Pall said farewell with your step facing the Summit. The Shadow Warden took the farewell as introduction. End him.
cr3_climb_pall_farewell.reward_chronicle_line: The Pall had set their step facing the Summit at farewell; the Shadow Warden ended for the introduction.

cr3_climb_pall_chair.name: After the Pall Marked a Chair at the Summit
cr3_climb_pall_chair.flavor: A chair at the Summit was marked for you. The Shadow Warden sat in the chair until you arrived. End him.

cr3_climb_pall_introduced_wind.name: After the Pall Introduced You to the Summit Wind
cr3_climb_pall_introduced_wind.flavor: The Pall introduced you to the Summit wind once. Three ice-wraiths had been there during the introduction. End them.

cr3_climb_summit_smaller_self.name: After the Summit Kept Your Smaller Self
cr3_climb_summit_smaller_self.flavor: The Summit kept the smaller version of you. A Penitent on the upper stone met the smaller you. End him. The smaller you stays kept.
cr3_climb_summit_smaller_self.reward_chronicle_line: The Summit had kept the smaller version of them; the Penitent on the upper stone met the smaller self and ended at it.

cr3_climb_warden_one_breath.name: After One Climbing Breath Was Yours
cr3_climb_warden_one_breath.flavor: Once a climbing breath belonged to you alone. Two Penitents above the snowline want a share. End them. The breath stays yours.

cr3_reach_water_drink.name: After You Drank from the Reach's Last Drinking
cr3_reach_water_drink.flavor: Once you promised the Reach a grain. The Last Reaper remembered the promise. End him. The grain stays planted.

cr3_reach_did_not_promise.name: After You Refused the Reach a Grain
cr3_reach_did_not_promise.flavor: Once you refused the Reach a grain. Three threshers had hoped you would. End them. The refusal stays a refusal.

cr3_reach_step_remembered.name: After the Reach Remembered Your Step II
cr3_reach_step_remembered.flavor: The Reach remembered your step. Two lurchers walked in the kept step. End them. The Reach will keep the step.

cr3_reach_almost_drowned.name: After You Almost Drowned in the Reach II
cr3_reach_almost_drowned.flavor: You almost drowned in the Reach. Four silt-drowners knew the almost-ness. End them. The drowning stays almost.

cr3_reach_song_loved.name: After the Reach Drowned a Song II
cr3_reach_song_loved.flavor: A song you loved drowned in the Reach. Two threshers hum it still. End them. The song will be quiet.

cr3_burned_library_lore_seen.name: After You Read the Burned Library's Lore
cr3_burned_library_lore_seen.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had read the Burned Library's lore, two of its wardens could not keep the lore from them; both fell at the climber's hand.
cr3_burned_library_lore_seen.flavor: Once you have read the Burned Library's lore, two wardens guard the second page. End them. The lore stays known.

cr3_pre_pall_shrine_lore.name: After You Read the Pre-Pall Shrine's Lore
cr3_pre_pall_shrine_lore.flavor: Once you have read the Pre-Pall Shrine's lore, the Keeper knows that you know. End him. The pre-Pall stays pre-Pall.

cr3_verren_counting_song.name: After You Heard Verren's Counting Song
cr3_verren_counting_song.flavor: Verren's counting song is in your head. The Shrine Keeper wants the song silent. End him. The song keeps counting.

cr3_lost_verse_3.name: After You Knew the Third Lost Verse
cr3_lost_verse_3.flavor: Once you know the third lost verse, three censer-shades in the Choir carry it. End them. The verse stays known.

cr3_pallid_stag_no_damage.name: The Pallid Stag, Untouched
cr3_pallid_stag_no_damage.flavor: The Pallid Stag, ended without a scratch on you. The Witherwood's old climbers wrote this kind of kill into songs.

cr3_chairman_one_round.name: The Chairman in a Single Round
cr3_chairman_one_round.flavor: The Chairman, ended in one round. The Sealed Chamber will not have time to re-seal.

cr3_devoured_named_at_death.name: Name the Devoured Captain at Death
cr3_devoured_named_at_death.flavor: Speak the Devoured Captain's old name as the killing blow lands. He may have forgotten it; you have not.

chain2_forager_a_a_loaf.name: The Forager's Path — A Loaf
chain2_forager_a_a_loaf.flavor: Two forager boys ate the loaf you set out. End them. The next loaf will be a real one.

chain2_forager_b_a_shoe.name: The Forager's Path — A Shoe
chain2_forager_b_a_shoe.flavor: A forager boy is wearing your shoe. End him. The shoe will come back to your foot.

chain2_forager_c_a_word.name: The Forager's Path — A Word
chain2_forager_c_a_word.flavor: A forager boy almost speaks a word. End him. The word will be in the air after, briefly.

chain2_forager_d_a_name.name: The Forager's Path — A Name
chain2_forager_d_a_name.reward_chronicle_line: They walked the Forager's Path through the Drowned Holds — loaf, shoe, word, name — and the last forager boy spoke the name before falling. It was a Brackmere name.
chain2_forager_d_a_name.flavor: The last forager boy at the end of the path. He speaks a name before you take him. The name is the kingdom's.

chain2_lamp_a_oil_for_climb.name: The Last Lamp — Oil for the Climb
chain2_lamp_a_oil_for_climb.flavor: The Lampkeeper gives you oil for the climb. Two bandits had tried to take it. End them. The oil stays.

chain2_lamp_b_at_the_pool.name: The Last Lamp — At the Reach's Pool
chain2_lamp_b_at_the_pool.flavor: Two silt-drowners at the Reach's pool tried to put out the lamp. End them. The lamp burns through the silt.

chain2_lamp_c_in_the_gullet.name: The Last Lamp — In the Gullet
chain2_lamp_c_in_the_gullet.flavor: Three slimes in the Gullet wanted the oil. End them. The lamp keeps its light through the throat.

chain2_lamp_d_at_the_summit.name: The Last Lamp — At the Summit
chain2_lamp_d_at_the_summit.reward_chronicle_line: They carried the Lampkeeper's oil from Gravewatch to the Summit, lit the lamp at the upper stone, and ended the Shadow Warden by the lamp's light. The Lampkeeper had been right to give it.
chain2_lamp_d_at_the_summit.flavor: The Summit. Light the lamp. End the Warden by its light. The Lampkeeper at Gravewatch will know it was used.

chain2_doors_a_widow.name: The Three Doorposts — The Widow's
chain2_doors_a_widow.flavor: A doorshut stands at a widow's old doorpost. End it. The widow's name will stay carved.

chain2_doors_b_father.name: The Three Doorposts — The Father's
chain2_doors_b_father.flavor: A doorshut at a father's old doorpost. End it. The father will not be the one shutting the door any more.

chain2_doors_c_child.name: The Three Doorposts — The Child's
chain2_doors_c_child.flavor: A doorshut at a child's old doorpost. End it. The child will be named on the post when you carve.

chain2_doors_d_kingdom.name: The Three Doorposts — The Kingdom's
chain2_doors_d_kingdom.reward_chronicle_line: They named three doorposts in the Drowned Holds — widow, father, child — and at the Sealed Chamber they ended the Chairman who had once decided the doorposts would be empty.
chain2_doors_d_kingdom.flavor: The Sealed Chamber. The Chairman who decided the doorposts should be empty. End him. The doorposts will stay named.

chain2_after_hunters_cache_collars.name: After You Matched the Hunter's Cache Collars
chain2_after_hunters_cache_collars.flavor: Once you have matched the Hunter's Cache collars, the pack lead knows. End him. The collars will be the pack's own.

chain2_after_atrels_register.name: After You Read the Atrél Register
chain2_after_atrels_register.flavor: Atrél's register names two of the procession. End them. The register will know.

chain2_after_palls_words.name: After You Read the Pall's Only Words II
chain2_after_palls_words.flavor: The Pall's only words are known to you. Two reliquary golems keep their record. End them. The words stay yours.

chain2_after_red_beards_haft_ii.name: After Red Beard's Haft, Again
chain2_after_red_beards_haft_ii.flavor: Red Beard's haft is still in the doorpost. Two more of his kind walk the road. End them. The haft will stay where it sits.

chain2_after_engineer_plans_ii.name: After the Engineer's Plans, the Bog Lurchers Knew
chain2_after_engineer_plans_ii.flavor: The Engineer's plans named three lurchers as breaches in his weir. End them. The plans will hold.

co_after_companion_first_name.name: After the Companion Told You Their First Name
co_after_companion_first_name.flavor: Your sworn told you their first name. Three bandits had hoped to learn it without permission. End them. The name stays a gift.

co_after_companion_grief.name: After the Companion Carried Part of Your Grief
co_after_companion_grief.flavor: Your sworn carried part of your grief for a while. Two of the procession noticed the lighter step. End them. The grief stays split.

co_after_first_watch.name: After the Companion Kept First Watch
co_after_first_watch.flavor: Your sworn kept first watch while you slept. Four wolves of the wood had hoped to test the sleep. End them. The watch holds.

co_after_ate_first.name: After the Companion Ate First for You
co_after_ate_first.flavor: Your sworn ate first to check the food. Two bandits had poisoned it. End them. The food stays safe.
co_after_ate_first.reward_chronicle_line: A sworn ate first to check the food; two bandits who had poisoned it ended for the checking.

co_after_old_name.name: After the Companion Remembered Your Old Name
co_after_old_name.flavor: Your sworn remembered the name you used to go by. A magistrate in Mourncross had crossed that name out. End him. The name comes back.

co_after_named_star.name: After the Companion Named a Star for You
co_after_named_star.flavor: Your sworn named a star for you. Two ice-wraiths above the snowline had been competing for the name. End them. The star stays yours.

co_after_shared_dream.name: After the Companion Shared a Dream
co_after_shared_dream.flavor: Your sworn shared a dream with you. Two censer-shades carried smoke from it. End them. The dream stays between you.

co_after_sleep_lighter.name: After the Companion Taught You to Sleep Lighter
co_after_sleep_lighter.flavor: Your sworn taught you to sleep lighter. Three carrion bats noticed the change. End them. The lighter sleep stays.

co_after_homeland_song.name: After the Companion Taught You a Homeland Song
co_after_homeland_song.flavor: Your sworn taught you a song from their homeland. Three threshers in the Reach hummed it back wrong. End them. The song will be sung right.

co_after_one_grief.name: After the Companion Told You One of Their Griefs
co_after_one_grief.flavor: Your sworn told you one of their griefs. A Red Beard in the Holds had been the source of it. End him.

co_after_learned_silent.name: After the Companion Learned to Keep Silent
