co_after_learned_silent.flavor: Your sworn learned to keep silent with you. Four bandits had hoped to overhear something. End them. The silence holds.

co_after_almost_left.name: After the Companion Almost Left at the Branching
co_after_almost_left.flavor: Your sworn almost left at the branching path. One wolf had been the argument's witness. End it. The companion stays.
co_after_almost_left.reward_chronicle_line: A sworn had almost left at the branching path; one wolf had been the witness. The wolf fell, and the sworn stayed.

co_after_lost_glove.name: After the Companion Lost a Glove
co_after_lost_glove.flavor: Your sworn lost a glove fetching something for you. Two silt-drowners wear it now. End them. The glove will be a pair again.

co_after_not_back_lookout.name: After the Companion Did Not Come Back from the Lookout
co_after_not_back_lookout.flavor: A previous sworn did not come back from the lookout. A Penitent above the snowline had been the lookout's last sight. End him.
co_after_not_back_lookout.reward_chronicle_line: A previous sworn had not returned from the lookout; the Penitent who had been the last thing they saw fell to the next climber.

co_after_petal_bone_tomb.name: After Someone Added a Petal at the Bone Tomb
co_after_petal_bone_tomb.flavor: Someone added a petal at the Bone Tomb for a name you'd carved. The Pre-Pall Shrine Keeper knew the giver. End him.

co_after_hireling_named_a_storm.name: After the Companion Named a Star — In the Storm
co_after_hireling_named_a_storm.flavor: Your sworn named the star again, in a storm. Four wraiths thought the naming was bravado. End them. The naming was just remembering.

co_after_pet_pricklehog.name: After the Pricklehog Left a Spine
co_after_pet_pricklehog.flavor: The pricklehog left a spine in a thrown thing. Three bandits had been the throwers. End them. The pricklehog will throw something back next.

co_after_carried_kettle_companion.name: After the Sworn Carried a Kettle with You
co_after_carried_kettle_companion.flavor: Once you and a sworn carried a kettle. Two trolls in the Gullet had remembered the weight. End them. The kettle stays where it sits.

c2_warrior_held_breath.name: The Warrior's Held Breath at the Pall
c2_warrior_held_breath.flavor: The Shadow Warden tests the warrior's held breath. Hold it through the fight. End him in the holding.

c2_warrior_brace_against_braced.name: The Warrior's Brace Against the Braced
c2_warrior_brace_against_braced.flavor: The Maw-Mother braces. Only a warrior holds against the bracing. End her in the brace.

c2_warrior_unmoved_by_relentless.name: The Warrior's Unmoved Step
c2_warrior_unmoved_by_relentless.flavor: A Penitent's relentless attack. Only a warrior's feet stay where they were. End him from the same square.

c2_warrior_late_line.name: The Warrior's Line Held Through the Late Hour
c2_warrior_late_line.flavor: Four magistrates in Mourncross. The warrior holds the gate against all four — one by one — without leaving the line.

c2_rogue_unseen_through_choir.name: The Rogue's Unseen Walk Through the Choir
c2_rogue_unseen_through_choir.flavor: Five censer-shades in the Choir. None of them see the rogue until they fall. The Choir's smoke barely moves.

c2_rogue_crit_at_dusk.name: The Rogue's Crit at Dusk
c2_rogue_crit_at_dusk.flavor: Three bandits at dusk. Each killing blow is a critical hit — the rogue's signature.

c2_rogue_through_doorshuts.name: The Rogue Through the Doorshuts
c2_rogue_through_doorshuts.flavor: Six doorshuts in the Drowned Holds. The rogue walks past each one before it closes. End them all.

c2_mage_unsing_the_cantor.name: The Mage's Unsinging of the Cantor
c2_mage_unsing_the_cantor.flavor: Cantor Vael in the cleansed kingdom. Only a mage can unsing him properly. End him in the unsinging.
c2_mage_unsing_the_cantor.reward_chronicle_line: A mage unsang Cantor Vael in the cleansed kingdom; the Choir's air was thinner for the rest of the season.

c2_mage_lamp_lit_for_a_climber.name: The Mage's Lamp Lit for Someone Who Was Not There
c2_mage_lamp_lit_for_a_climber.flavor: A lamp lit itself at Gravewatch for a climber who was not there. A library-warden had been keeping the lamp from lighting. End him.

c2_mage_silt_drowner_pitch.name: The Mage's Pitch Against the Silt-Drowner
c2_mage_silt_drowner_pitch.flavor: Four silt-drowners. The mage's pitch breaks each one's harmonic. The Reach hears the breaking.

c2_mage_after_lamp_unsaid.name: After the Lamp Lit Without You Saying II
c2_mage_after_lamp_unsaid.flavor: A second lamp lit without you saying. The Pre-Pall Shrine Keeper had been the one keeping it dark. End him.

c2_ranger_silent_six_revisit.name: The Ranger's Silent Six II
c2_ranger_silent_six_revisit.flavor: Six wolves. The ranger takes them all without the rest of the pack hearing. The wood's old hunters did it this way through winter.

c2_ranger_carrion_clean.name: The Ranger's Clean Walk Through Carrion
c2_ranger_carrion_clean.flavor: Five carrion bats above the Witherwood. The ranger ends each one without touching the carrion below. The Witherwood respects clean feet.

c2_ranger_trail_through_climb.name: The Ranger's Trail Through the Climb
c2_ranger_trail_through_climb.flavor: Four ice-wraiths above the snowline. The ranger traces the trail their previous selves walked, and ends each one at a precise spot.

c2_ranger_after_wolf_let_sleep.name: The Ranger, After a Wolf Let Them Sleep II
c2_ranger_after_wolf_let_sleep.flavor: A wolf let you sleep once. Five of its kin are reconsidering the letting. End them. The first wolf will know.

c2_cleric_funeral_for_a_warden.name: The Cleric's Funeral for the Shadow Warden
c2_cleric_funeral_for_a_warden.flavor: The Shadow Warden at the cleansed Summit. Only a cleric can give him a proper funeral. End him in the giving.
c2_cleric_funeral_for_a_warden.reward_chronicle_line: A cleric gave the Shadow Warden a proper funeral at the cleansed Summit; the Pall paused longer than usual.

c2_cleric_blessing_the_holds.name: The Cleric's Blessing for the Holds
c2_cleric_blessing_the_holds.flavor: Eight bonesongs in the Drowned Holds. The cleric blesses each one to silence. The Holds will be one count quieter.

c2_cleric_lay_down_the_chairman.name: The Cleric Lays the Chairman Down
c2_cleric_lay_down_the_chairman.flavor: The Chairman in the Sealed Chamber. Only a cleric's hand lays him down properly. End him in the laying-down.

ph_hireling_real_name.name: After the Hireling Told You Their Real Name
ph_hireling_real_name.flavor: Your hireling told you their real name. Three bandits had hoped to use it as leverage. End them. The name stays a gift.

ph_hireling_blow_for_you.name: After the Hireling Took a Blow for You
ph_hireling_blow_for_you.flavor: Your hireling took a blow meant for you once. A Penitent above the snowline knew the blow. End him. The hireling lives.

ph_hireling_blind_side.name: After the Hireling Walked at Your Blind Side
ph_hireling_blind_side.flavor: Your hireling walked at your blind side. Two bog-lurchers had been hoping the side stayed blind. End them.

ph_hireling_grip.name: After the Hireling Taught You a Grip
ph_hireling_grip.flavor: Your hireling taught you a grip the kingdom's old fighters used. A stone-golem above the snowline tests it. End him with the grip.

ph_hireling_drank_with_you.name: After the Hireling Drank With You
ph_hireling_drank_with_you.flavor: Your hireling drank with you for the first time. Two bandits had thought the hireling would be alone. End them.

ph_hireling_pendant.name: After the Hireling Left a Pendant
ph_hireling_pendant.flavor: Your hireling left a pendant in your pack. Three doorshuts in the Holds noticed the weight. End them.

ph_fallen_hireling_inn.name: After a Fallen Hireling Was Recognized at an Inn
ph_fallen_hireling_inn.flavor: A fallen hireling of yours was recognized at an inn. Four wolves of the road that took them are still out there. End them.

ph_fallen_hireling_chronicle.name: After a Fallen Hireling Was Added to the Chronicle
ph_fallen_hireling_chronicle.flavor: A fallen hireling of yours is named in the Chronicle. One of the procession holds an echo of the name. End them. The name stays.
ph_fallen_hireling_chronicle.reward_chronicle_line: A hireling who had fallen had been written into the Chronicle; one of the procession holding the echo fell to the next walk.

ph_ash_hound_killed.name: After the Ash Hound Killed for You
ph_ash_hound_killed.flavor: The ash hound killed for you. Three wolves had been considering the ash hound prey. End them. The hound holds.

ph_ash_hound_followed_grief.name: After the Ash Hound Followed Your Grief
ph_ash_hound_followed_grief.flavor: The ash hound followed your grief. One of the procession noticed the following. End it. The grief stays followed.

ph_ash_hound_warmed.name: After the Ash Hound Warmed Your Boots
ph_ash_hound_warmed.flavor: The ash hound warmed your boots. Two ice-wraiths above the snowline noticed the warmer step. End them.

ph_magpie_warned.name: After the Magpie Warned You at the Worst Beat
ph_magpie_warned.flavor: The magpie warned you at the worst beat. A bandit had counted on the best one. End him.

ph_magpie_said_word.name: After the Magpie Said a Word
ph_magpie_said_word.flavor: The magpie said a word that was almost yours. A magistrate in Mourncross took the word as evidence. End him.

ph_pricklehog_kitchen.name: After the Pricklehog Warmed a Kitchen
ph_pricklehog_kitchen.flavor: The pricklehog warmed a kitchen for you. Two doorshuts had hoped to close on the warmth. End them.

ph_reborn_hireling.name: A Hireling Who Walked With a Previous You
ph_reborn_hireling.flavor: A hireling who had walked with a previous you recognizes your gait. A bandit on the road has been waiting for the recognition. End him.

ph_reborn_pet_recognized.name: A Pet Recognized You at the Pen
ph_reborn_pet_recognized.flavor: A pet at the pen recognized you across runs. Two wolves of the wood had been considering the pet a target. End them.
ph_reborn_pet_recognized.reward_chronicle_line: A pet at the Gravewatch pen had recognized them across runs; the wolves that had eyed it fell.

ph_reborn_pet_name.name: After You Named a Pet a Name You Had Used Before
ph_reborn_pet_name.flavor: You named a pet with a name a previous you had used. Three wolves of the wood knew the older bearer of the name. End them.

ph_forgot_first_pet.name: After You Forgot the Name of Your First Pet
ph_forgot_first_pet.flavor: You forgot the name of your first pet. Two bonesongs in the Holds had eaten the name. End them. The name will be in air again, briefly.

cr_hub_first_arrival.name: The Crossroads' First Recognition
cr_hub_first_arrival.flavor: Your first step at the Crossroads — your shadow was late by one count. Two wolves of the wood noticed. End them.

cr_hub_shadow_late.name: After Your Shadow Was Late at the Crossroads
cr_hub_shadow_late.flavor: Once your shadow was late at the Crossroads. Three bandits on the road had been waiting for the late shadow. End them.

cr_hub_road_lamp_arrival.name: After a Lamp Came On at Your Arrival
cr_hub_road_lamp_arrival.flavor: A lamp came on at your arrival once. Two bandits had hoped to arrive in the dark. End them. The lamp stays lit.

cr_hub_save_lamp.name: After the Save-Lamp Set Itself
cr_hub_save_lamp.flavor: The lamp at the save-place set itself once. Two wolves of the wood had been the surprise. End them.

cr_hub_traveler_returns.name: The Traveler Returns to the Crossroads
cr_hub_traveler_returns.flavor: A Reborn climber arrives at the Crossroads. Four bandits had hoped to test the returner. End them.
cr_hub_traveler_returns.reward_chronicle_line: A Reborn climber arrived at the Crossroads; four bandits who would have tested the returner fell at the wood's edge.

ft_after_chronicle_full.name: The Forgotten Thing II
ft_after_chronicle_full.flavor: The Pall forgot one of its own. The thing waits, older than you remembered. End it again. The Pall still will not notice.

ft_after_purify.name: The Forgotten Thing, After the Purify
ft_after_purify.reward_chronicle_line: Once they had purified the kingdom, the thing the Pall had forgotten was already half-gone; they ended the rest.
ft_after_purify.flavor: After the Purify, the forgotten thing is half-gone — the kingdom is remembering itself again. End the rest.

ft_no_damage_taken.name: The Forgotten Thing, Untouched
ft_no_damage_taken.flavor: The forgotten thing. End it without a scratch on you. The Pall will not notice the cleanness either.

ft_named_at_death.name: Name the Forgotten Thing as It Falls
ft_named_at_death.flavor: Speak the name the kingdom had given the thing — the name the kingdom then forgot. It falls in the speaking.

cr_walked_thrice.name: After You Walked the Crossroads Three Times
cr_walked_thrice.flavor: Twice the Crossroads marked you. Six bandits on the road had been counting. End them. The third walk will be cleaner.

cr_hub_after_three_endings.name: After You Have Walked the Kingdom in Three Ways
cr_hub_after_three_endings.reward_chronicle_line: They had walked Mournhold in three ways across runs — purified, warded, sealed — and at the Crossroads on their fourth arrival, they ended the Shadow Warden one last time.
cr_hub_after_three_endings.flavor: Three endings sit in the Chronicle. The Crossroads' lamp has been on for you since arrival. End the Shadow Warden — the kingdom has been waiting for this exact climber.

cr_companion_panic.name: After the Companion Walked You Through a Panic
cr_companion_panic.flavor: Your sworn walked you through a panic once. Two bandits had noticed the breathing change. End them.

cr_pall_studied_companion.name: After the Pall Studied Your Companion
cr_pall_studied_companion.reward_chronicle_line: The Pall had studied a sworn of theirs with interest; a Penitent above the snowline had also been studying. The Penitent fell first.
cr_pall_studied_companion.flavor: The Pall studied your companion with interest. A Penitent above the snowline studied too. End him.

cr_pall_did_not_take_name.name: After the Pall Did Not Take Your Companion's Name
cr_pall_did_not_take_name.flavor: The Pall did not take your companion's name. The Shadow Warden at the Summit cannot understand the refusal. End him.

cr_reborn_companion_chronicle.name: A Reborn Chronicle Held Your Companion's Name
cr_reborn_companion_chronicle.reward_chronicle_line: A previous Chronicle had held the sworn's name across runs; a magistrate in Mourncross had tried to scratch it out, and fell in the trying.
cr_reborn_companion_chronicle.flavor: A Chronicle across runs held your companion's name. A magistrate in Mourncross tried to scratch the name out. End him.

br2_after_lookout_remembered_ii.name: After the Karst Lookout Remembered You II
br2_after_lookout_remembered_ii.flavor: The Karst lookout remembered you twice now. The Pre-Pall Shrine Keeper noticed the remembering. End him.

br2_three_borders_open.name: After the Border Air Changed II
br2_three_borders_open.reward_chronicle_line: Across runs, the Border air had changed; the Other Mournhold had been glimpsed. At the Summit, the Shadow Warden ended for the doubled crossing.
br2_three_borders_open.flavor: Across runs, the Border air changed for you. The Other Mournhold has been glimpsed. End the Warden at the Summit.

br2_emissary_gravewatch.name: After an Emissary Was at Gravewatch
br2_emissary_gravewatch.flavor: An emissary left a letter at Gravewatch. Three bandits on the road tried to intercept a reply. End them.

dl_baker_bread.name: After the Baker Kept Yesterday's Bread for Birds
dl_baker_bread.flavor: A baker at Gravewatch kept yesterday's bread for birds. Two wolves of the wood had hoped to take it. End them. The birds get the bread.

dl_child_stick.name: After a Child Threw a Stick for a Dog
dl_child_stick.flavor: A child threw a stick for a dog. Two bandits on the road interrupted the throw. End them. The stick stays where it lands.

dl_chimney_swept.name: After a Chimney Was Swept Clean
dl_chimney_swept.flavor: A chimney at Gravewatch was swept clean. Three bandits on the road had been counting on smoke for cover. End them.

dl_clothes_line.name: After a Clothes Line Was Set Again
dl_clothes_line.flavor: A clothes line at Gravewatch was set again — the village is keeping up. Two bandits had hoped the line stayed empty. End them.

dl_dog_recognition.name: After a Dog Barked in Friendly Recognition
dl_dog_recognition.flavor: A village dog barked in friendly recognition when you passed. Three wolves of the wood took the bark as territory. End them.

dl_road_blackbird.name: After a Blackbird Lit Your Way at Dusk
dl_road_blackbird.flavor: A blackbird lit your way at dusk. Three bandits on the road had hoped the dusk would be lightless. End them.

dl_road_mile_shorter.name: After a Mile Was Shorter Than It Had Been
dl_road_mile_shorter.flavor: A mile felt shorter than the last time you walked it. Four wolves of the wood had not counted on the kingdom shortening for you. End them.

dl_road_milestone.name: After a Milestone Recognized Your Step
dl_road_milestone.flavor: A milestone on the road recognized your step. Two bandits had been leaning against the milestone. End them.

dl_road_traveller_nod.name: After a Traveller Passed in Silent Nod
dl_road_traveller_nod.flavor: A traveller passed you on the road with a silent nod. A bandit had wanted the traveller's nod for himself. End him.

dl_save_breath.name: After Saving Caught Your Breath
dl_save_breath.flavor: The save place caught your breath for you. Two wolves of the wood noticed the longer pause. End them.

dl_save_owl.name: After an Owl Sat at the Saving Window
dl_save_owl.flavor: An owl sat at the saving window. Three carrion bats had not expected the owl. End them.

dl_save_remembered_last.name: After Saving Remembered the Last Time
dl_save_remembered_last.flavor: The save place remembered the last time you saved. Two bandits had been counting on you forgetting. End them.

dl_child_scar.name: After a Child Asked About Your Scar
dl_child_scar.flavor: A child at Gravewatch asked about your scar. One wolf of the wood had given you the scar. End it. The answer to the child will be true.

dl_child_drew_picture.name: After a Child Drew a Picture of You
dl_child_drew_picture.flavor: A child drew a picture of you. Two bandits on the road had laughed at the picture. End them. The picture stays drawn.

dl_child_named_star.name: After a Child Named a Star for You
dl_child_named_star.flavor: A child at Gravewatch named a star for you. Three ice-wraiths above the snowline had been jealous of the naming. End them.
dl_child_named_star.reward_chronicle_line: A child had named a star for the climber; three ice-wraiths envious of the naming fell at the upper snowline.

dl_warrior_widow_thank.name: After a Widow Thanked the Warrior First
dl_warrior_widow_thank.flavor: A widow in Mourncross thanked you first, before the other climbers. A magistrate noticed the thanking. End him.

dl_rogue_lock_opened.name: After a Lock Opened for the Rogue Alone
dl_rogue_lock_opened.flavor: A lock opened for you, just you, in the Holds. Three doorshuts wanted to test the opening. End them.

dl_ranger_thicket_closed.name: After a Thicket Closed Behind the Ranger
dl_ranger_thicket_closed.flavor: A thicket in the Witherwood closed behind you. Four wolves of the pack had been on the other side. End them.

se_smith_long_one.name: After the Smith Left a Long One for You
se_smith_long_one.flavor: The smith at Gravewatch left a long blade for you on her counter. Three bandits on the road had hoped to take it. End them.

se_smith_spark.name: After a Spark Lit for the Climber
se_smith_spark.flavor: A spark at the forge lit for you. Two wolves of the wood had hoped the spark would not catch. End them.

se_smith_weapon_grip.name: After a Weapon Remembered a Grip
se_smith_weapon_grip.flavor: A weapon at the forge remembered a grip — your previous self's grip. A Penitent above the snowline knew the grip. End him.

se_smith_blessed_strike.name: After the Smith Blessed a Strike
se_smith_blessed_strike.flavor: The smith blessed a strike of yours. A stone-golem above the snowline wanted to test the blessing. End him.

se_smith_held_too_long.name: After the Smith Held Your Weapon Too Long
se_smith_held_too_long.flavor: The smith held your weapon too long — she had been remembering its previous owner. A magistrate noticed the longer return. End him.

se_smith_anvil_song.name: After an Anvil Sang Your Name
se_smith_anvil_song.flavor: An anvil at Gravewatch sang your name for one count. A library-warden had been writing the name down. End him. The name keeps itself.

se_purify_quieter_step.name: After Purify, the Kingdom Quieter in Your Step
se_purify_quieter_step.flavor: Across runs, the Witherwood recognized you. Four threshers in the Reach had heard about the recognition. End them.

se_atrel_priest_robe.name: After Atrél's Priest Robe Kept You Warm
se_atrel_priest_robe.flavor: Across runs, an Atrél priest robe kept you warm. Two censer-shades noticed the warmer climber. End them.

se_atrel_unhollowed_thanked.name: After an Unhollowed Thanked You
se_atrel_unhollowed_thanked.flavor: An unhollowed in Mourncross thanked you across runs. Two of the procession had wanted the thank for themselves. End them.

se_atrel_first_grief.name: After the First Grief Was Easy to Set Aside
se_atrel_first_grief.flavor: Once your first grief had been easy to set aside. An effigy in the Choir noticed the easier shoulders. End it.

se_atrel_kept_companion.name: After You Kept a Grief for the Companion Too
se_atrel_kept_companion.flavor: Once you kept a grief for the companion as well. Two censer-shades had hoped to take the doubled grief. End them.

se_warden_inn_chair.name: After You Left a Chair at the Inn Empty
se_warden_inn_chair.flavor: Across runs, you left a chair at the inn empty when you became the Warden. A Penitent above the snowline knew the chair. End him.

se_warden_keeper_silence.name: After You Started Carrying a Keeper-Silence
se_warden_keeper_silence.flavor: You carry a keeper-silence across runs. The new Shadow Warden tests the carry. End him.
se_warden_keeper_silence.reward_chronicle_line: A climber who had once been the Warden carried the keeper-silence into a new run; the new Shadow Warden ended at the silence.

se_warden_pall_three_steps.name: After the Pall Walked Three Steps With You
se_warden_pall_three_steps.flavor: The Pall walked three steps with you across runs. The new Shadow Warden walked alone. End him. The Pall will not walk the next three.

se_mage_book_remembered.name: After a Book Remembered What You Meant
se_mage_book_remembered.flavor: A book at the Burned Library remembered what you meant. A warden had been waiting to cross out the meaning. End him.

se_cleric_god_glanced.name: After a God Glanced Aside at You
se_cleric_god_glanced.flavor: A god glanced aside at you, briefly. Three of the procession noticed the glance. End them.

rd_stream_thanked.name: After a Stream Thanked You Under a Bridge
rd_stream_thanked.flavor: A stream under a bridge thanked you for crossing it gently. Three bandits on the road had hoped to muddy the stream after. End them.

rd_wayside_shrine.name: After a Wayside Shrine Warmed a Step
rd_wayside_shrine.flavor: A wayside shrine warmed a step you took past it. Two wolves of the wood had noticed the warmth. End them.

rd_old_horseshoe.name: After You Found an Old Horseshoe in the Dust
rd_old_horseshoe.flavor: An old horseshoe was in the road's dust. Two bandits had hoped to pick it up first. End them. The horseshoe stays in the dust.

rd_old_song.name: After an Old Song Walked the Distance
rd_old_song.flavor: An old song walked the distance with you. Three wolves of the wood had been the song's audience before. End them.

rd_dust_footprint.name: After Dust Kept Your Footprint
rd_dust_footprint.flavor: Dust on the road kept your footprint a count too long. Two bandits studied the print. End them.

rd_not_taken_child.name: After You Did Not Answer a Child
rd_not_taken_child.flavor: Once you did not answer a child who spoke to you on the road. A bonesong in the Holds knows the unanswered question. End it.
rd_not_taken_child.reward_chronicle_line: Once a climber had not answered a child on the road; a Holds bonesong holding the unanswered question fell to the next walk.

rd_not_taken_apology.name: After You Did Not Apologize
rd_not_taken_apology.flavor: Once you did not apologize to someone you owed. Two doorshuts in the Holds know whose doorpost was the owed one's. End them.

rd_not_taken_widow.name: After You Did Not Ask the Widow's Name
rd_not_taken_widow.flavor: Once you did not ask the widow her name in Mourncross. A magistrate had been waiting for the asking. End him.

rd_not_taken_door_closed.name: After You Did Not Close a Door You Had Opened
rd_not_taken_door_closed.flavor: Once you did not close a door you had opened. Three doorshuts know the open door's location. End them.

rd_not_taken_cry.name: After You Did Not Cry When You Could Have
rd_not_taken_cry.flavor: Once you did not cry when you could have. Two censer-shades in the Choir hold the un-cried tears as smoke. End them.

sv_dust_corner.name: After Saving Left Dust in the Corner
sv_dust_corner.flavor: Dust in the corner of the save place kept a shape. Two wolves of the wood had been the shape's makers. End them.

sv_chalk_doorpost.name: After the Save-Place Chalk Marks Glowed
sv_chalk_doorpost.flavor: Chalk marks on the save-place doorpost glowed faintly. A doorshut in the Holds wanted to read the chalk. End it.

sv_dust_shape_under_bed.name: After the Save-Dust Kept a Shape
sv_dust_shape_under_bed.flavor: Dust under the save-place bed kept your sleeping shape. A bonesong in the Holds noticed the shape. End it.

sv_innkeeper_pillow.name: After the Innkeeper Left a Pillow for You
sv_innkeeper_pillow.flavor: The innkeeper at the save-place left a pillow for you. Three bandits on the road wanted the pillow. End them.

sv_room_swept.name: After the Save-Place Room Was Swept
sv_room_swept.flavor: The save-place room had been swept clean for you. Two wolves of the wood had hoped to track in mud. End them.

sv_dream_pall_corridor.name: After You Dreamt of a Pall Corridor
sv_dream_pall_corridor.flavor: You dreamt of a Pall corridor at the save place. A Penitent above the snowline had walked the same corridor. End him.

sv_dream_priest_robing.name: After You Dreamt of a Priest Robing You
sv_dream_priest_robing.flavor: You dreamt of a priest robing you in the Choir. An effigy had been the robing priest. End it. The robe stays your own.

sv_dream_child_grave.name: After You Dreamt of a Child Naming a Grave
sv_dream_child_grave.flavor: You dreamt of a child naming a grave. One of the procession in Mourncross had been the grave's previous holder. End it.
sv_dream_child_grave.reward_chronicle_line: A climber dreamt of a child naming a grave; the procession-member who had been the grave's previous holder fell to the next walk.

ee_atrel_kingdom_quieter.name: After Atrél's Peace, the Kingdom Quieter in Your Step
ee_atrel_kingdom_quieter.flavor: Across runs, Atrél's Peace had made the kingdom quieter in your step. Four threshers in the Reach had not gotten the memo. End them.

ee_atrel_priest_robe_warmed.name: After the Priest Robe Kept Warm in the Choir
ee_atrel_priest_robe_warmed.flavor: A priest robe had kept you warm in the Choir across runs. An effigy took the warmth as evidence. End it.

ee_atrel_kept_grief_companion.name: After You Kept a Grief for a Companion II
ee_atrel_kept_grief_companion.flavor: Across runs, you kept a grief for a companion. Two censer-shades had hoped to take the kept grief. End them.

ee_warden_keeper_song.name: After a Keeper-Song Started Forming
ee_warden_keeper_song.flavor: A keeper-song started to form in you across runs. A Penitent above the snowline could already hum it. End him.

ee_warden_atrel_not_argue.name: After Atrél Did Not Argue With You Tonight
ee_warden_atrel_not_argue.flavor: Atrél did not argue with you tonight across runs. Two censer-shades had been waiting for the argument. End them.

ee_warden_chronicle_line_open.name: After the Chronicle Kept a Line Open for Warden
ee_warden_chronicle_line_open.flavor: The Chronicle kept a line open for a Warden's note. The new Shadow Warden reads the line. End him in the reading.
ee_warden_chronicle_line_open.reward_chronicle_line: The Chronicle had kept a line open for a Warden's note across runs; the new Warden read the line, and fell at it.

ee_hidden_truth_summit_meet.name: After the Summit Will Meet You Differently
ee_hidden_truth_summit_meet.flavor: The Summit will meet you differently across runs. The Shadow Warden knows the change. End him in it.

ee_hidden_truth_priest_recognized_ii.name: After the Choir's Priest Recognized You II
ee_hidden_truth_priest_recognized_ii.flavor: Across runs, the Choir's priest had recognized you. The Cantor would have argued the recognition. End him.
ee_hidden_truth_priest_recognized_ii.reward_chronicle_line: The Choir's priest had recognized them; the Cantor who would have argued the recognition fell to the recognized step.

ee_purify_witherwood_recognized.name: After Purify, the Witherwood Recognized You II
ee_purify_witherwood_recognized.flavor: The Witherwood recognized you across runs after Purify. The pack lead had been keeping the recognition from spreading. End him.

ee_warden_step_softer_under_boot.name: After the Summit Ground Was Softer Under Your Boot
ee_warden_step_softer_under_boot.flavor: Across runs after Warden, the Summit ground was softer under your boot. Two stone-golems had hoped to break the soft ground. End them.

ee_warden_lampkeeper_warden.name: After the Lampkeeper Called You Warden II
ee_warden_lampkeeper_warden.flavor: Across runs, the Lampkeeper called you Warden. The new Shadow Warden could not be called the same. End him. The title stays yours.

ee_warden_pall_walked_three.name: After the Pall Walked Three Steps II
ee_warden_pall_walked_three.flavor: Across runs, the Pall walked three steps with you. Two Penitents above the snowline counted the steps. End them.

ee_reborn_warden_chronicle.name: Reborn After the Warden's Chronicle Line
ee_reborn_warden_chronicle.flavor: A Reborn climber, whose Chronicle held a Warden's line open. Two magistrates wanted the line crossed out. End them.

ee_reborn_breath_steamed_pall.name: Reborn After Your Breath Steamed the Pall
ee_reborn_breath_steamed_pall.flavor: Across runs, your breath steamed the Pall air easier. Four ice-wraiths above the snowline knew the breath. End them.

ee_reborn_kingdom_quieter.name: Reborn After Kingdom Quieter
ee_reborn_kingdom_quieter.flavor: A Reborn climber whose previous self had quieted the kingdom. Three threshers had not adjusted to the quiet. End them.

ee_mother_appetite.name: After the Mother Appetite Came Into You
ee_mother_appetite.flavor: The Mother Appetite came into you once. The Maw-Mother in the Gullet knows the answering hunger. End her. The appetite leaves with her.
ee_mother_appetite.reward_chronicle_line: A climber had taken the Mother Appetite into themselves briefly; the Maw-Mother in the Gullet ended at the answering hunger.
